    async function loadSession(sessionId) {
    workbenchItems.clear();
    selectedWorkbenchItems.clear();
    window.workbenchItemCount = 0; // 重置计数器
    workbenchGrid.innerHTML = `<div class="empty-workbench-state"><i class="fas fa-image"></i><p>上传或生成的图片将出现在这里</p></div><div id="vLine" class="guide-line v"></div><div id="hLine" class="guide-line h"></div>`;
    
    // RE-ADD GENEALOGY LAYER IF CLEARED
    const svgLayer = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "svg");
    svgLayer.id = "genealogyLayer";
    svgLayer.classList.add("genealogy-layer");
    svgLayer.innerHTML = `<defs>
        <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto"><polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#cbd5e0"/></marker>
        <marker id="arrowhead-active" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto"><polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#2A5C82"/></marker>
    </defs>`;
    workbenchGrid.appendChild(svgLayer);

    mainImageFile = null;
    referenceImageFiles = [];
    maskDataUrl = null;
    lastGeneratedImageForEditing = null;
    isContextPreviewHidden = false;
    pendingBaseImageShare = false;
    pendingReferenceImageShares.clear();
    lastGenerationContext = null;
    closeMagicWandModal();

    const session = sessions.find(s => s.id === sessionId);
    if (session) {
        currentSessionId = sessionId;
        
        renderMessages(session.messages);
        
        const lastBotImageMessage = [...session.messages].reverse().find(msg => 
            msg.sender === 'bot' && msg.imageData?.src
        );
        
        if (lastBotImageMessage) {
            try {
                lastGeneratedImageForEditing = await dataURLToFile(
                    lastBotImageMessage.imageData.src, 
                    `context-${Date.now()}.png`
                );
            } catch (e) { 
                console.error("Failed to restore image:", e); 
                lastGeneratedImageForEditing = null; 
            }
        }

        const imageLoadPromises = [];
        for (const msg of session.messages) {
            if (msg.imageData) {
                const images = Array.isArray(msg.imageData) ? msg.imageData : [msg.imageData];
                images.forEach(img => {
                    if (img.src) {
                        imageLoadPromises.push(
                            dataURLToFile(img.src, `history-${Date.now()}.png`)
                                .then(file => {
                                    addImageToWorkbench(
                                        file, 
                                        msg.sender === 'user' ? '上传图片' : 'AI生成'
                                    );
                                    return file;
                                })
                                .catch(e => {
                                    console.error('Failed to load history image:', e);
                                    return null;
                                })
                        );
                    }
                });
            }
        }
        await Promise.all(imageLoadPromises);
        
        await updateImagePreview();
        renderHistoryList();
        closeMobileMenu();
        
        if (lastGeneratedImageForEditing) {
            mainImageFile = lastGeneratedImageForEditing;
            pendingBaseImageShare = true;
        }
    }
}


    async function getSmartSuggestions(base64ImageData) {
        try {
            const prompt = `你是一位创意助手。根据这张图片，为用户提供三个简洁、可操作、且富有创意的修改或增强建议。这些建议应该是用户会直接输入的指令短语。例如：“把天空变成暴风雨的样子”、“在水上加一只小船”、“将季节改为秋天”。请仅返回一个JSON字符串数组，格式为 \`["建议一", "建议二", "建议三"]\`。不要在你的回复中包含 "JSON" 字样或代码块标记。`;
            
            const response = await ai.models.generateContent({
                model: textModel,
                contents: {
                    parts: [
                        { text: prompt },
                        { inlineData: { data: base64ImageData, mimeType: 'image/png' } }
                    ]
                }
            });
            
            const jsonString = response.text.trim();
            const suggestions = JSON.parse(jsonString);

            if (Array.isArray(suggestions) && suggestions.every(s => typeof s === 'string')) {
                return suggestions.map(s => ({ label: s, prompt: s }));
            }
            return null;
        } catch (error) {
            console.error("获取智能建议时出错:", error);
            return null;
        }
    }

    function appendSuggestionButtons(messageElement, suggestions = []) {
        const container = document.createElement('div');
        container.className = 'suggestion-container';
        
        const defaultSuggestions = [
            { label: '添加戏剧性光影', prompt: '为这张图添加更富戏剧性的光影效果' },
            { label: '转为电影风格', prompt: '将这张图的风格转换为电影质感' },
            { label: '让它更生动', prompt: '让这张图的色彩更生动鲜艳' }
        ];

        const suggestionsToRender = (suggestions && suggestions.length > 0) ? suggestions : defaultSuggestions;

        suggestionsToRender.forEach(suggestion => {
            const button = document.createElement('button');
            button.className = 'suggestion-btn';
            button.textContent = `[ ${suggestion.label} ]`;
            button.onclick = () => {
                if (suggestion.action) suggestion.action();
                else { userInput.value = suggestion.prompt; userInput.focus(); updateSendBtnState(); }
            };
            container.appendChild(button);
        });
        messageElement.querySelector('.message-content')?.appendChild(container);
    }

    function isSearchGroundingNeeded(text) {
        const keywords = ['新款', '最新', '当前', '最近', '2024', '新闻', '事件'];
        return keywords.some(keyword => text.includes(keyword));
    }

    async function generateTextWithSearch(prompt) {
        const response = await ai.models.generateContent({
           model: textModel,
           contents: `请为接下来的图像生成任务，详细描述一下“${prompt}”。请专注于视觉细节，例如颜色、形状、纹理、构图和氛围。`,
           config: { tools: [{googleSearch: {}}] },
        });
        const sources = response.candidates?.[0]?.groundingMetadata?.groundingChunks?.map(c => c.web).filter(w => w?.uri) || [];
        return { success: true, text: response.text, sources };
    }

    function handleRegenerate() {
        if (isSending || !lastGenerationContext) return;
        isSending = true; updateSendBtnState();
        const { baseImage, referenceImages, mask, prompt, isGenTask, isEditTask } = lastGenerationContext;
        const currentSession = sessions.find(s => s.id === currentSessionId);
        if (!currentSession) { isSending = false; updateSendBtnState(); return; }

        const regenUserMessage = { sender: 'user', type: 'text', content: '[ 指令: 重新生成 ]' };
        currentSession.messages.push(regenUserMessage); addMessage(regenUserMessage);
        
        let placeholderDiv = document.createElement('div');
        placeholderDiv.className = 'message bot-message';
        const botAvatar = `<img src="https://www.marmoai.cn/images/avatars/WeChat84b8e05cc8464bb089de1c46bed38809.jpg" alt="小M" style="width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%; flex-shrink: 0;">`;
        
        const isMasklessMaterialEdit = isEditTask && !mask && isMaterialRequest(prompt);
        let placeholderText = isMasklessMaterialEdit ? "正在为您重新生成多个版本..." : "收到，正在为您重新生成...";
        
        let placeholderContent = `<div class="image-placeholder-container"><div class="image-placeholder-box"><div class="spinner"></div></div><div class="placeholder-text">${placeholderText}</div></div>`;
        placeholderDiv.innerHTML = botAvatar + placeholderContent;
        chatMessages.appendChild(placeholderDiv); chatMessages.scrollTop = chatMessages.scrollHeight;
        
        (async () => {
            try {
                let result;
                if (isEditTask) {
                    if (isMasklessMaterialEdit) {
                        result = await editOrQueryImageWithGemini_Multiple(prompt, baseImage, referenceImages, mask);
                    } else {
                        result = await editOrQueryImageWithGemini(prompt, baseImage, referenceImages, mask);
                    }
                } else if (isGenTask) {
                    const imageResult = await generateImageWithImagen(prompt);
                    const singleImageData = imageResult.imageData[0];
                    result = { success: true, text: '', imageData: singleImageData.imageData, mimeType: singleImageData.mimeType };
                } else {
                     throw new Error("Regeneration is only available for image tasks.");
                }
                
                if (result.success) {
                    const botMessage = { sender: 'bot', type: 'bot-rich' };

                    if (Array.isArray(result.imageData)) {
                        botMessage.imageData = await Promise.all(result.imageData.map(async (img) => {
                            const originalSrc = `data:${img.mimeType};base64,${img.imageData}`;
                            const watermarkedSrc = await addWatermark(originalSrc);
                            return {
                                src: watermarkedSrc,
                                mimeType: img.mimeType 
                            };
                        }));
                        botMessage.content = result.text || '已为您生成多个版本，请选用一张以继续。';
                        lastGeneratedImageForEditing = null;
                    } else if (result.imageData) {
                        const originalImgSrc = `data:${result.mimeType};base64,${result.imageData}`;
                        const watermarkedImgSrc = await addWatermark(originalImgSrc);
                        botMessage.imageData = { src: watermarkedImgSrc };
                        lastGeneratedImageForEditing = await dataURLToFile(watermarkedImgSrc, `generated-${Date.now()}.png`);
                        mainImageFile = lastGeneratedImageForEditing;
                        botMessage.content = result.text || buildBotFallbackText(prompt, {isEditTask, isGenTask});
                        appendSuggestionButtons(placeholderDiv, await getSmartSuggestions(result.imageData));
                    }
                    
                    placeholderDiv.innerHTML = botAvatar + buildMessageContentHTML(botMessage);
                    currentSession.messages.push(botMessage);
                    await updateImagePreview();

                } else {
                     throw new Error(result.text || "API did not return a valid image.");
                }

            } catch (error) {
                console.error("API Error during regeneration:", error);
                placeholderDiv.innerHTML = botAvatar + `<div>重新生成失败: ${error.message}</div>`;
                currentSession.messages.push({ sender: 'bot', type: 'text', content: `重新生成失败: ${error.message}` });
            } finally {
                isSending = false; updateSendBtnState(); await dbHelper.saveSession(currentSession); renderHistoryList();
            }
        })();
    }

    const isImageEditRequest = (text, hasMask, hasRefImages) => {
        if (hasMask || hasRefImages) return true;
        const keywords = [
            '修改', '添加', '变成', '改成', '改为', '换成', '删除', '擦掉', '移除', '让它', 
            '把它', '增加', '画上', '调整', '编辑', '替换', '风格转换', '重绘', '扩图', 
            '角度', '方向', '朝向', '移动', '旋转', '翻转', '颜色', '色调', '亮度', '对比度', 
            '饱和度', '材质', '质感', '效果', '滤镜', '模糊', '锐化', '加上', '放入', 
            '去掉', '拿走', '改变', '变换', '变成', '变为'
        ];
        return keywords.some(keyword => text.toLowerCase().includes(keyword));
    };

    async function handleSend() {
      let textFromInput = userInput.value.trim();
    
    // --- 方案 A：意图静默增强 ---
    // 如果存在意图锁，且当前用户输入的指令中不包含触发后端分流的关键词
    if (currentIntentLock === 'material' && textFromInput && !isMaterialRequest(textFromInput)) {
        textFromInput = "材质替换为：" + textFromInput;
    } else if (currentIntentLock === 'erase' && textFromInput && !isRemovalRequest(textFromInput)) {
        textFromInput = "局部重绘并移除：" + textFromInput;
    }
    
    // 关键：一旦开始处理发送逻辑，立即释放锁，避免干扰后续对话
    currentIntentLock = null;
        const textFromInput = userInput.value.trim();
        const regenerationKeywords = ["不满意", "重来", "再试一次", "重新生成", "换一个", "另一个版本", "try again", "regenerate"];
        if (regenerationKeywords.some(k => textFromInput.toLowerCase().includes(k)) && lastGenerationContext) {
            handleRegenerate(); return;
        }
        
        // 检查是否有待处理的精准修图框选
        if (preciseEditMode.pendingBox && preciseEditMode.pendingItemId && textFromInput) {
    const promptText = textFromInput.replace(/^修改框选区域：\s*/, '');
    if (promptText) {
        // 1. 同步 Session 状态
        if (!currentSessionId) {
            currentSessionId = `session-${Date.now()}`;
            sessions.unshift({ id: currentSessionId, title: '精准修图', timestamp: Date.now(), messages: [] });
        }
        const currentSession = sessions.find(s => s.id === currentSessionId);
        const userMsg = { sender: 'user', type: 'text', content: textFromInput };
        currentSession.messages.push(userMsg);
        
        // 2. 更新 UI
        renderMessages(currentSession.messages);
        renderHistoryList();
        userInput.value = '';
        userInput.style.height = 'auto';

        // 3. 执行后台修图
        const box = preciseEditMode.pendingBox;
        const itemId = preciseEditMode.pendingItemId;
        preciseEditMode.pendingBox = null;
        preciseEditMode.pendingItemId = null;
        await performPreciseEdit(itemId, box, promptText);
        return;
    }
}
        
        const effectiveBaseImage = mainImageFile || lastGeneratedImageForEditing;
        if (isSending || (!textFromInput && !effectiveBaseImage)) return;
        isSending = true; updateSendBtnState();

        let userMessages = [];
        if (textFromInput) userMessages.push({ sender: 'user', type: 'text', content: textFromInput });
        if (pendingBaseImageShare && mainImageFile) {
             userMessages.push({ sender: 'user', type: 'image', imageData: { src: await fileToDataURL(mainImageFile) } });
             pendingBaseImageShare = false;
        }
        for (const file of [...pendingReferenceImageShares]) {
            userMessages.push({ sender: 'user', type: 'image',imageData: { src: await fileToDataURL(file) } });
            pendingReferenceImageShares.delete(file);
        }
        
        if (!currentSessionId) {
            currentSessionId = `session-${Date.now()}`;
            const tempTitle = textFromInput.substring(0, 20) || '图片对话';
            const newSession = { id: currentSessionId, title: tempTitle, timestamp: Date.now(), messages: [] };
            sessions.unshift(newSession);
            (async () => {
                const smartTitle = await generateSessionTitle(textFromInput);
                const s = sessions.find(s => s.id === currentSessionId);
                if (s) { s.title = smartTitle; await dbHelper.saveSession(s); renderHistoryList(); }
            })();
        }
        const currentSession = sessions.find(s => s.id === currentSessionId);
        currentSession.messages.push(...userMessages);
        renderMessages(currentSession.messages); renderHistoryList();
        userInput.value = ''; userInput.style.height = 'auto';
        
        const mainImageSent = mainImageFile;
        const referenceImagesSent = [...referenceImageFiles];
        const maskSent = maskDataUrl;
        
        const hasMask = !!maskSent;
        const hasRefImages = referenceImagesSent.length > 0;
        const isGenTask = isImageGenerationRequest(textFromInput) && !effectiveBaseImage;
        const isEditTask = !!effectiveBaseImage && isImageEditRequest(textFromInput, hasMask, hasRefImages);
        const isQueryTask = !!effectiveBaseImage && !isEditTask;

        lastGenerationContext = (isGenTask || isEditTask) ? { prompt: textFromInput, baseImage: effectiveBaseImage, referenceImages: [...referenceImagesSent], mask: maskSent, isGenTask, isEditTask } : null;

        let placeholderDiv = document.createElement('div');
        placeholderDiv.className = 'message bot-message';
        const botAvatar = `<img src="https://www.marmoai.cn/images/avatars/WeChat84b8e05cc8464bb089de1c46bed38809.jpg" alt="小M" style="width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%; flex-shrink: 0;">`;
        
        let placeholderText = "思考中...";
        let showImagePlaceholder = false;
        
        const isMasklessMaterialEdit = isEditTask && !hasMask && isMaterialRequest(textFromInput);

        if (isGenTask) { placeholderText = "图片正在创建..."; showImagePlaceholder = true; } 
        else if (isMasklessMaterialEdit) { placeholderText = "正在为您生成多个版本..."; showImagePlaceholder = true; }
        else if (isEditTask) { placeholderText = "图片正在创建..."; showImagePlaceholder = true; } 
        else if (isQueryTask) { placeholderText = "正在分析您的图片并思考..."; }

        let placeholderContent = showImagePlaceholder 
            ? `<div class="image-placeholder-container"><div class="image-placeholder-box"><div class="spinner"></div></div><div class="placeholder-text">${placeholderText}</div></div>`
            : `<div>${placeholderText}</div>`;

        placeholderDiv.innerHTML = botAvatar + placeholderContent;
        chatMessages.appendChild(placeholderDiv); chatMessages.scrollTop = chatMessages.scrollHeight;
        
        mainImageFile = null;
        referenceImageFiles = [];
        maskDataUrl = null;
        await updateImagePreview();

        try {
            let result;
            if (isGenTask) {
                const imageResult = await generateImageWithImagen(textFromInput);
                const singleImageData = imageResult.imageData[0];
                result = { success: true, text: '', imageData: singleImageData.imageData, mimeType: singleImageData.mimeType };

            } else if (isEditTask) {
                if (isMasklessMaterialEdit) {
                    result = await editOrQueryImageWithGemini_Multiple(textFromInput, effectiveBaseImage, referenceImagesSent, maskSent);
                } else {
                    result = await editOrQueryImageWithGemini(textFromInput, effectiveBaseImage, referenceImagesSent, maskSent);
                }
            } else if (isQueryTask) {
                result = await editOrQueryImageWithGemini(textFromInput, effectiveBaseImage, referenceImagesSent, maskSent);
            } else {
                result = await generateTextWithGemini(textFromInput, currentSessionId);
            }

            if (result.success) {
                const botMessage = { sender: 'bot', type: 'bot-rich' };
                
                if (Array.isArray(result.imageData)) {
                    botMessage.imageData = await Promise.all(result.imageData.map(async (img) => {
                        const originalSrc = `data:${img.mimeType};base64,${img.imageData}`;
                        const watermarkedSrc = await addWatermark(originalSrc);
                        
                        try {
                            const file = await dataURLToFile(watermarkedSrc, `generated-${Date.now()}.png`);
                            addImageToWorkbench(file, 'AI生成', {
                                parentId: effectiveBaseImage ? fileToWorkbenchIdMap.get(effectiveBaseImage) : null,
                                generationParams: { prompt: textFromInput }
                            });
                        } catch (e) {
                            console.error('Failed to add image to workbench:', e);
                        }
                        
                        return {
                            src: watermarkedSrc,
                            mimeType: img.mimeType 
                        };
                    }));
                    
                    botMessage.content = result.text || '已为您生成多个版本，请选用一张以继续。';
                    lastGeneratedImageForEditing = null;
                } else if (result.imageData) {
                    const originalImgSrc = `data:${result.mimeType};base64,${result.imageData}`;
                    const watermarkedImgSrc = await addWatermark(originalImgSrc);
                    botMessage.imageData = { src: watermarkedImgSrc };
                    
                    try {
                        lastGeneratedImageForEditing = await dataURLToFile(watermarkedImgSrc, `generated-${Date.now()}.png`);
                        addImageToWorkbench(lastGeneratedImageForEditing, 'AI生成', {
                                parentId: effectiveBaseImage ? fileToWorkbenchIdMap.get(effectiveBaseImage) : null,
                                generationParams: { prompt: textFromInput }
                            });
                        mainImageFile = lastGeneratedImageForEditing;
                    } catch (e) {
                        console.error('Failed to add image to workbench:', e);
                    }
                    
                    botMessage.content = result.text || buildBotFallbackText(textFromInput, {isEditTask, isGenTask});
                    appendSuggestionButtons(placeholderDiv, await getSmartSuggestions(result.imageData));
                } else {
                    botMessage.content = result.text;
                    if (!isQueryTask) { lastGeneratedImageForEditing = null; }
                }
                
                placeholderDiv.innerHTML = botAvatar + buildMessageContentHTML(botMessage);
                currentSession.messages.push(botMessage);
                await updateImagePreview();

            } else {
                 throw new Error(result.text || "API returned success:false without a message.");
            }
        } catch (error) {
            console.error("API Error:", error);
            placeholderDiv.innerHTML = botAvatar + `<div>处理失败: ${error.message}</div>`;
            currentSession.messages.push({ sender: 'bot', type: 'text', content: `处理失败: ${error.message}` });
        } finally {
            isSending = false; updateSendBtnState(); await dbHelper.saveSession(currentSession); renderHistoryList();
        }
    }

    
    // --- Mask Editor Functions ---
    function openMaskEditor(file) {
        maskEditor.activeFile = file;
        const img = new Image();
        const objectURL = URL.createObjectURL(file);
        img.onload = () => {
            URL.revokeObjectURL(objectURL);
            requestAnimationFrame(() => requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                const editorBody = maskEditorModal.querySelector('.mask-editor-body');
                const containerWidth = editorBody.clientWidth - 40, containerHeight = editorBody.clientHeight - 40;
                const scale = Math.min(1, containerWidth / img.naturalWidth, containerHeight / img.naturalHeight);
                const width = img.naturalWidth * scale, height = img.naturalHeight * scale;
                maskEditor.scale = scale; maskEditor.points = []; maskEditor.hasSelection = false;
                maskCanvasContainer.innerHTML = ''; 
                maskCanvasContainer.style.width = `${width}px`; maskCanvasContainer.style.height = `${height}px`;
                maskEditor.imageCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
                maskEditor.drawingCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
                [maskEditor.imageCanvas, maskEditor.drawingCanvas].forEach((canvas, index) => {
                    canvas.width = width; canvas.height = height;
                    canvas.style.cssText = `position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; z-index: ${index + 1};`;
                    maskCanvasContainer.appendChild(canvas);
                });
                maskEditor.imageCanvas.getContext('2d').drawImage(img, 0, 0, width, height);
                maskEditor.ctx = maskEditor.drawingCanvas.getContext('2d');
                if (maskDataUrl) {
                    const maskImg = new Image();
                    maskImg.onload = () => { maskEditor.ctx.drawImage(maskImg, 0, 0, width, height); maskEditor.hasSelection = true; };
                    maskImg.src = maskDataUrl;
                }
            }));
        };
        img.onerror = () => { URL.revokeObjectURL(objectURL); alert("无法加载图片进行编辑。"); closeMaskEditor(); }
        maskEditorModal.style.display = 'flex';
        img.src = objectURL;
    }

    function closeMaskEditor() {
        maskEditorModal.style.display = 'none'; maskCanvasContainer.innerHTML = ''; detachGlobalLassoListeners();
         currentIntentLock = null; 
        maskEditor = { isDrawing: false, imageCanvas: null, drawingCanvas: null, ctx: null, scale: 1, activeFile: null, points: [], hasSelection: false, globalMoveListener: null, globalUpListener: null };
    }

    function getMaskCanvasCoords(e) {
        if (!maskEditor.drawingCanvas) return null;
        const rect = maskEditor.drawingCanvas.getBoundingClientRect();
        const clientX = e.touches ? e.touches[0].clientX : e.clientX;
        const clientY = e.touches ? e.touches[0].clientY : e.clientY;
        const x = Math.min(Math.max(clientX - rect.left, 0), rect.width);
        const y = Math.min(Math.max(clientY - rect.top, 0), rect.height);
        return { x, y };
    }

    function handleLassoStart(e) {
        if (e.touches) e.preventDefault();
        if ((e.button !== 0 && !e.touches) || !maskEditor.drawingCanvas || !maskEditor.ctx) return;
        const point = getMaskCanvasCoords(e);
        if (!point) return;
        maskEditor.isDrawing = true; maskEditor.points = [point]; maskEditor.hasSelection = false;
        detachGlobalLassoListeners(); attachGlobalLassoListeners();
        const ctx = maskEditor.ctx;
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, maskEditor.drawingCanvas.width, maskEditor.drawingCanvas.height);
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(point.x, point.y);
        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.8)'; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
    }

    function handleLassoMove(e) {
        if (e.touches) e.preventDefault();
        if (!maskEditor.isDrawing || !maskEditor.ctx) return;
        const point = getMaskCanvasCoords(e);
        if (!point) return;
        maskEditor.points.push(point);
        maskEditor.ctx.lineTo(point.x, point.y);
        maskEditor.ctx.stroke();
    }

    function handleLassoEnd() {
        if (!maskEditor.isDrawing) return;
        maskEditor.isDrawing = false; detachGlobalLassoListeners(); finalizeLassoPath();
    }

    function finalizeLassoPath() {
        const { drawingCanvas: canvas, ctx, points } = maskEditor;
        if (!canvas || !ctx) return;
        if (!points || points.length < 3) {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            maskEditor.points = []; maskEditor.hasSelection = false;
            alert('请沿着物体边缘勾勒一个闭合的选区。');
            return;
        }
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(points[0].x, points[0].y);
        for (let i = 1; i < points.length; i++) ctx.lineTo(points[i].x, points[i].y);
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.35)';
        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.8)';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.fill(); ctx.stroke();
        maskEditor.hasSelection = true;
    }

    function attachGlobalLassoListeners() {
        if (!maskEditor.globalMoveListener) {
            maskEditor.globalMoveListener = (event) => handleLassoMove(event);
            window.addEventListener('mousemove', maskEditor.globalMoveListener);
            window.addEventListener('touchmove', maskEditor.globalMoveListener, { passive: false });
        }
        if (!maskEditor.globalUpListener) {
            maskEditor.globalUpListener = () => handleLassoEnd();
            window.addEventListener('mouseup', maskEditor.globalUpListener);
            window.addEventListener('touchend', maskEditor.globalUpListener);
        }
    }

    function detachGlobalLassoListeners() {
        if (maskEditor.globalMoveListener) {
            window.removeEventListener('mousemove', maskEditor.globalMoveListener);
            window.removeEventListener('touchmove', maskEditor.globalMoveListener);
            maskEditor.globalMoveListener = null;
        }
        if (maskEditor.globalUpListener) {
            window.removeEventListener('mouseup', maskEditor.globalUpListener);
            window.removeEventListener('touchend', maskEditor.globalUpListener);
            maskEditor.globalUpListener = null;
        }
    }
    
    function applyMask() {
        if (!maskEditor.hasSelection || !maskEditor.activeFile) {
            alert('请先使用套索工具完成一个选区。'); return;
        }
        const originalImage = new Image();
        const objectURL = URL.createObjectURL(maskEditor.activeFile);
        originalImage.src = objectURL;
        originalImage.onload = () => {
            URL.revokeObjectURL(objectURL);
            const tempCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
            tempCanvas.width = originalImage.naturalWidth; tempCanvas.height = originalImage.naturalHeight;
            const tempCtx = tempCanvas.getContext('2d'), scale = maskEditor.scale;
            tempCtx.beginPath();
            if (maskEditor.points.length > 0) {
                tempCtx.moveTo(maskEditor.points[0].x / scale, maskEditor.points[0].y / scale);
                for (let i = 1; i < maskEditor.points.length; i++) tempCtx.lineTo(maskEditor.points[i].x / scale, maskEditor.points[i].y / scale);
            }
            tempCtx.closePath();
            tempCtx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 1)';
            tempCtx.fill();
            maskDataUrl = tempCanvas.toDataURL('image/png');
            updateImagePreview(); closeMaskEditor();
        };
        originalImage.onerror = () => { URL.revokeObjectURL(objectURL); alert('无法加载图片以应用蒙版，请重试。'); closeMaskEditor(); };
    }

    let closeMobileMenu = () => {};

    function triggerAIActiveGuidance() {
        const currentSession = sessions.find(s => s.id === currentSessionId);
        if (!currentSession || currentSession.messages.length > 2) return;

        const messageDiv = addMessage({ sender: 'bot', content: '图片已上传。您可以直接输入指令进行编辑，或尝试以下操作：' });
        appendSuggestionButtons(messageDiv, [
            { label: '绘制蒙版并替换', action: () => { if(mainImageFile) openMaskEditor(mainImageFile) } },
            { label: '咨询这张图片', prompt: '详细描述这张图的内容' },
        ]);
    }
    
    async function renderAssetLibrary() {
        userAssets = await dbHelper.getAllAssets();
        assetLibraryGrid.innerHTML = '';
        emptyLibraryState.style.display = userAssets.length === 0 ? 'block' : 'none';

        userAssets.forEach(asset => {
            const item = document.createElement('div');
            item.className = 'asset-item';
            item.innerHTML = `
                <img src="${asset.dataUrl}" alt="Saved Asset">
                <button class="delete-asset-btn" data-id="${asset.id}">×</button>
            `;
            item.addEventListener('click', async (e) => {
                const deleteButton = e.target.closest('.delete-asset-btn');
                if (deleteButton) {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    const idToDelete = parseInt(deleteButton.dataset.id, 10);
                    const confirmed = await showCustomConfirm('确定要从素材库删除这张图片吗？');
                    if (confirmed) {
                        await dbHelper.deleteAsset(idToDelete);
                        await renderAssetLibrary();
                        await updateImagePreview();
                    }
                } else {
                    const file = await dataURLToFile(asset.dataUrl, `asset-${asset.id}.png`);
                    referenceImageFiles.push(file);
                    pendingReferenceImageShares.add(file);
                    await updateImagePreview();
                    updateSendBtnState();
                }
            });
            assetLibraryGrid.appendChild(item);
        });
    }

    async function initializeApp() {
        // Initialize Latent Canvas
        setupLatentCanvas();
        const isTouchDevice = ('ontouchstart' in window) || (navigator.maxTouchPoints > 0);
        if (isTouchDevice) {
            const lassoHint = document.querySelector('.lasso-hint');
            if (lassoHint) lassoHint.textContent = '用手指沿物体边缘拖拽完成套索';
        }

        await dbHelper.init();
        await renderAssetLibrary();
        sessions = await dbHelper.getAllSessions();
        renderHistoryList();
        
        if (sessions.length > 0) await loadSession(sessions[0].id);
        else startNewSession();
        
        const container = document.querySelector('.container'), sidebar = document.querySelector('.assets-sidebar');
        const toggleSidebarBtn = document.querySelector('.toggle-sidebar');
        const icon = toggleSidebarBtn ? toggleSidebarBtn.querySelector('i') : null;

        // 初始化默认为收起状态
        if (window.innerWidth > 1024) {
            sidebar.classList.add('collapsed'); 
            container.classList.add('sidebar-collapsed');
            container.classList.remove('sidebar-open');
            if(icon) icon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)';
        }

        workbenchGrid.addEventListener('dragover', (e) => e.preventDefault());
        setupSelectionBox(); 

        initWorkbenchZoom();
        initAtmospherePalette(); // Initialize new Atmosphere features

        userInput.addEventListener('input', () => { 
            userInput.style.height = 'auto'; 
            userInput.style.height = `${userInput.scrollHeight}px`; 
            updateSendBtnState(); 
        });
        
        userInput.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => { 
            if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) { 
                e.preventDefault(); 
                handleSend(); 
            } 
        });
        
        if (sendBtn) sendBtn.addEventListener('click', handleSend);
        if (mainImageUploadBtn) mainImageUploadBtn.addEventListener('click', () => mainImageUpload.click());
        
        if (mainImageUpload) {
            mainImageUpload.addEventListener('change', async (e) => {
                const incomingFiles = Array.from(e.target.files);
                if (incomingFiles.length === 0) return;
                
                incomingFiles.forEach((file, index) => {
                    addImageToWorkbench(file, '上传图片');
                    
                    if (!mainImageFile && index === 0) {
                        mainImageFile = file;
                        pendingBaseImageShare = true;
                        isContextPreviewHidden = false;
                        maskDataUrl = null;
                    } 
                    else {
                        referenceImageFiles.push(file);
                        pendingReferenceImageShares.add(file);
                    }
                });

                if (mainImageFile && incomingFiles[0].type.startsWith('image/')) {
                    const currentSession = sessions.find(s => s.id === currentSessionId);
                    if (!currentSession || currentSession.messages.length <= 2) {
                        setTimeout(triggerAIActiveGuidance, 100);
                    }
                }

                e.target.value = '';
                await updateImagePreview();
                updateSendBtnState();
            });
        }

        if (toggleSidebarBtn) {
            toggleSidebarBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                if (window.innerWidth > 1024) {
                    const isCollapsed = sidebar.classList.toggle('collapsed');
                    container.classList.toggle('sidebar-open', !isCollapsed);
                    container.classList.toggle('sidebar-collapsed', isCollapsed);
                    if(icon) icon.style.transform = isCollapsed ? 'rotate(0deg)' : 'rotate(180deg)';
                }
            });
        }
        
        if (newSessionBtn) newSessionBtn.addEventListener('click', startNewSession);
        
        const clearWorkbenchBtn = document.getElementById('clearWorkbench');
        if (clearWorkbenchBtn) {
            clearWorkbenchBtn.addEventListener('click', clearWorkbench);
        }

        // --- 工作台工具箱按钮事件 (Robust Binding) ---
        const bindToolboxBtn = (selector, handler) => {
            const btn = workbenchToolbox.querySelector(selector);
            if (btn) {
                btn.addEventListener('click', handler);
            }
        };

        bindToolboxBtn('.select', () => {
            if (currentActiveWorkbenchItemId) selectWorkbenchItem(currentActiveWorkbenchItemId);
            hideWorkbenchToolbox();
        });

       bindToolboxBtn('.upscale', async () => {
    if (!currentActiveWorkbenchItemId) return;
    const item = workbenchItems.get(currentActiveWorkbenchItemId);
    if (!item) return;

    hideWorkbenchToolbox();

    // 1. 添加占位符（复用分层拆解的样式）
    const placeholder = document.createElement('div');
    placeholder.className = 'world-placeholder';
    placeholder.style.left = `${parseFloat(item.el.style.left) + parseFloat(item.el.style.width) + 20}px`;
    placeholder.style.top = `${parseFloat(item.el.style.top)}px`;
    placeholder.style.width = `${parseFloat(item.el.style.width)}px`;
    placeholder.style.height = `${parseFloat(item.el.style.height)}px`;
    
    // ==================== 核心修复 START ====================
    // 描述: 动态计算边框和字体大小以补偿缩放。
    const inverseScale = 1 / workbenchZoom;
    const visualBorderWidth = 2;
    const visualFontSize = 12;
    placeholder.style.border = `${visualBorderWidth * inverseScale}px dashed #ccc`;
    
    placeholder.innerHTML = '<span><i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin"></i> 高清增强中...</span>';
    
    const span = placeholder.querySelector('span');
    if (span) {
        span.style.fontSize = `${visualFontSize * inverseScale}px`;
    }
    // ==================== 核心修复 END ====================

    workbenchGrid.appendChild(placeholder);

    // 2. 添加消息提示
    addMessage({ 
        sender: 'bot', 
        type: 'text', 
        content: '✨ 正在执行智能高清增强 (Super Upscale)...\nAI 正在重绘细节、锐化边缘并提升整体质感，请稍候...' 
    });

    try {
        // 3. Prompt for High Fidelity Upscaling
        const prompt = "Image Restoration & Reconstruction: Redraw this low-quality image into a pristine, ultra-high-resolution (4K) masterpiece. Aggressively remove all blur, noise, and compression artifacts. CRITICAL: Do not just sharpen the existing pixels. Instead, synthesise and hallucinate missing high-frequency details (such as skin texture, hair strands, fabric patterns, and sharp edges) that are lost in the original. Re-imagine the subject with perfect focus and clarity while keeping the original subject identity, pose, and overall composition intact. The output must look like a sharp, professional commercial photograph taken with a modern high-end DSLR.";
        
        // 4. Call Gemini
        const result = await editOrQueryImageWithGemini(prompt, item.file);
        
        // 5. Handle Result
        if (result.success && result.imageData) {
            const imgSrc = `data:${result.mimeType};base64,${result.imageData}`;
            const file = await dataURLToFile(imgSrc, `hd-upscaled-${Date.now()}.png`);
            
            // 计算位置：在原图右侧
            const itemRect = item.el.getBoundingClientRect();
            const containerRect = workbenchZoomContainer.getBoundingClientRect();
            const baseX = (itemRect.left - containerRect.left) / workbenchZoom + parseFloat(item.el.style.width) + 20;
            const baseY = (itemRect.top - containerRect.top) / workbenchZoom;

            // 移除占位符
            placeholder.remove();

            // 添加新图片到工作台（复用基因回溯逻辑）
            const newId = addImageToWorkbench(file, '高清增强版', { 
                x: baseX, 
                y: baseY,
                parentId: currentActiveWorkbenchItemId, 
                type: 'upscale',
                generationParams: { 
                    action: 'upscale',  // 标记操作类型
                    prompt: prompt,     // 原始 Prompt
                    sourceId: currentActiveWorkbenchItemId // 原图 ID
                } // 记录生成参数用于回溯
            });
            
            // 添加消息提示
            addMessage({ sender: 'bot', type: 'text', content: '✅ **高清增强完成！**\n新图片已生成在原图右侧，细节和清晰度已大幅提升。' });
            
            // 选中新图片并添加动画效果
            setTimeout(() => {
                selectWorkbenchItem(newId);
                const newItem = workbenchItems.get(newId);
                if (newItem && newItem.el) {
                    newItem.el.style.boxShadow = "0 0 20px #FFD700";
                    setTimeout(() => newItem.el.style.boxShadow = "", 1500);
                }
            }, 100);
        } else {
            throw new Error("生成结果为空");
        }
    } catch (e) {
        console.error("Upscale failed:", e);
        // 移除占位符
        placeholder.remove();
        addMessage({ sender: 'bot', type: 'text', content: `❌ 高清增强失败: ${e.message}` });
    }
});

                    renderStickyNotesOnWorkbench(itemId, item.critiquesData);
                }
            } else {
                // 如果没有任何数据，则执行第一次辩论
                triggerAgentDebate(itemId);
            }
            // --- 修改结束 ---
        });

bindToolboxBtn('.multiview', async () => {
    const itemId = currentActiveWorkbenchItemId;
    if (!itemId) return;
    const item = workbenchItems.get(itemId);
    if (!item) return;

    hideWorkbenchToolbox();

    // 1. 创建自适应占位符
    const placeholder = document.createElement('div');
    placeholder.className = 'world-placeholder';
    const inverseScale = 1 / workbenchZoom;
    placeholder.style.cssText = `
        left: ${parseFloat(item.el.style.left) + parseFloat(item.el.style.width) + 20}px;
        top: ${parseFloat(item.el.style.top)}px;
        width: ${parseFloat(item.el.style.width)}px;
        height: ${parseFloat(item.el.style.height)}px;
        border: ${2 * inverseScale}px dashed #ccc;
    `;
    placeholder.innerHTML = `<span style="font-size: ${14 * inverseScale}px;"><i class="fas fa-eye fa-spin"></i> 正在智能识别场景类型...</span>`;
    workbenchGrid.appendChild(placeholder);

    try {
        const base64 = await fileToBase64(item.file);
        
        // 2. 视觉预检：让 AI 告诉我们它看到了什么
        const classifierResponse = await ai.models.generateContent({
            model: 'gemini-2.5-flash', // 使用识别能力强的模型
            contents: {
                parts: [
                    { text: "Analyze this image and return ONLY one of these three words: 'CHARACTER' (for person/creature/statue), 'PRODUCT' (for small objects/electronics), or 'SPACE' (for building/interior/landscape). Do not return anything else." },
                    { inlineData: { data: base64, mimeType: item.file.type || 'image/png' } }
                ]
            }
        });
        
        const category = classifierResponse.text.trim().toUpperCase();
        let finalPrompt = "";
        let uiMessage = "";
        let placeholderTitle = "";

        // 3. 根据类型动态配置逻辑
        if (category.includes('CHARACTER')) {
            uiMessage = "👤 **正在执行【角色三视图】推演**...\nAI 正在精准还原角色的正面、侧面及背面细节。";
            placeholderTitle = "正在绘制角色三视图...";
            finalPrompt = `Create a professional character sheet (3-view) based on this character. 
            Must include: Front view, Side view, and Back view.
            Style: Character design orthographic projection, neutral background, consistent clothing and features.`;
        } else if (category.includes('PRODUCT')) {
            uiMessage = "🗿 **正在执行【物品多维视图】推演**...\nAI 正在对该物体的结构、材质进行多角度拆解。";
            placeholderTitle = "正在生成物品结构图...";
            finalPrompt = `Create a professional product design multi-view (3-view) based on this object.
            Must include: Front, Side, and Top views.
            Style: Product design orthographic sheet, industrial design presentation, identical material and lighting.`;
        } else {
            // 空间/建筑分类：严格执行 俯视、左视、右视
            uiMessage = "📐 **正在执行【空间/建筑多维视图】推演**...\nAI 正在解析大空间的透视逻辑，生成俯视图、左视图及右视图。";
            placeholderTitle = "正在推演空间三向视图...";
            finalPrompt = `Create a professional architectural orthographic multi-view presentation (3-view sheet) based on this image. 
                    Maintain 100% consistency in materials, lighting, textures, and spatial modeling from the original image. 
                    This is NOT a drawing, blueprint, or sketch; it is a photorealistic multi-angle photorealistic visualization. 
            The final image MUST contain exactly:
            1. A Top view (俯视图) from a bird's eye perspective.
            2. A Left Elevation (左视图) showing the left side of the structure/space.
            3. A Right Elevation (右视图) showing the right side of the structure/space.
            Style: Professional architectural rendering, realistic textures, consistent spatial logic, high-fidelity visualization.`;
        }

        // 4. 更新 UI 状态
        addMessage({ sender: 'bot', type: 'text', content: uiMessage });
        placeholder.querySelector('span').innerHTML = `<i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin"></i> ${placeholderTitle}`;

        // 5. 执行多维生成 (调用你已有的核心函数)
        const result = await editOrQueryImageWithGemini(finalPrompt, item.file);

        if (result.success && result.imageData) {
            const imgSrc = `data:${result.mimeType};base64,${result.imageData}`;
            const file = await dataURLToFile(imgSrc, `multiview-${Date.now()}.png`);
            
            placeholder.remove();
            addImageToWorkbench(file, '多维视图', {
                x: parseFloat(item.el.style.left) + parseFloat(item.el.style.width) + 20,
                y: parseFloat(item.el.style.top),
                parentId: itemId
            });
            addMessage({ sender: 'bot', type: 'text', content: '✅ **多维视图生成完成！**' });
        }
    } catch (e) {
        console.error("Multiview adaptation failed:", e);
        placeholder.remove();
        addMessage({ sender: 'bot', type: 'text', content: `❌ 处理失败: ${e.message}` });
    }
});

// Layer State Management
// Structure: { itemId: { layerIndex: { selected: bool, visible: bool, locked: bool } } }
const layerStates = new Map();

function getLayerState(itemId, layerIndex) {
    if (!layerStates.has(itemId)) layerStates.set(itemId, {});
    const itemStates = layerStates.get(itemId);
    if (!itemStates[layerIndex]) {
        itemStates[layerIndex] = { selected: false, visible: true, locked: false };
    }
    return itemStates[layerIndex];
}


// Helper to ensure footer with Fusion Edit controls
function ensureLayerPanelFooter(itemId) {
    if (!layerManagerModal) return;
    let footer = layerManagerModal.querySelector('.layer-panel-footer');
    
    // Re-create footer every time to ensure clean state
    if (footer) footer.remove();
    
    footer = document.createElement('div');
    footer.className = 'layer-panel-footer';
    footer.style.cssText = 'padding: 12px; border-top: 1px solid #eee; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:8px; background:#fcfcfc;';
    
    // Fusion Edit Container
    const fusionContainer = document.createElement('div');
    fusionContainer.id = 'fusionEditContainer';
    fusionContainer.style.cssText = 'display:none; flex-direction:column; gap:6px; animation:fadeIn 0.2s;';
    
    const fusionLabel = document.createElement('div');
    fusionLabel.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-magic" style="color:var(--primary-color)"></i> <b>融合编辑 (Fusion Edit)</b>';
    fusionLabel.style.fontSize = '12px';
    
    const fusionInput = document.createElement('input');
    fusionInput.type = 'text';
    fusionInput.id = 'fusionEditInput';
    fusionInput.placeholder = '例：改成红色皮革材质...';
    fusionInput.style.cssText = 'width:100%; padding:8px; border:1px solid #ddd; border-radius:4px; font-size:13px;';
    
    const fusionBtn = document.createElement('button');
    fusionBtn.className = 'btn-primary';
    fusionBtn.innerHTML = '应用更改 (Apply)';
    fusionBtn.style.width = '100%';
    fusionBtn.onclick = () => handleFusionEdit(itemId);

    fusionContainer.appendChild(fusionLabel);
    fusionContainer.appendChild(fusionInput);
    fusionContainer.appendChild(fusionBtn);
    
    // Explode Button
    const explodeBtn = document.createElement('button');
    explodeBtn.className = 'btn-secondary';
    explodeBtn.id = 'explodeAllBtn';
    explodeBtn.style.cssText = 'width:100%; font-size:12px; padding:8px; color:#444; background:#f0f4f8; border:1px solid #d1d9e6; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:6px;';
    explodeBtn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-bomb" style="color:#e53e3e;"></i> 物理拆解所有图层 (Explode Layers)';
    
    // Explicitly bind the onclick event
    explodeBtn.onclick = async (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        e.stopPropagation();
        
        const confirmed = await showCustomConfirm("确定要物理拆解图片吗？\nAI将按照识别到的语义图层，将它们逐一提取为独立文件。");
        if(confirmed) {
            layerManagerModal.style.display = 'none';
            triggerLayerExplosion(itemId);
        }
    };

    footer.appendChild(fusionContainer);
    footer.appendChild(explodeBtn);
    layerManagerModal.appendChild(footer);
}

function updateFusionUI(itemId) {
    const item = workbenchItems.get(itemId);
    if (!item || !item.layers) return;
    
    const fusionContainer = document.getElementById('fusionEditContainer');
    const explodeBtn = document.getElementById('explodeAllBtn');
    if (!fusionContainer) return;

    // Check if any layer is selected
    let hasSelection = false;
    item.layers.forEach((_, idx) => {
        if (getLayerState(itemId, idx).selected) hasSelection = true;
    });

    if (hasSelection) {
        fusionContainer.style.display = 'flex';
        explodeBtn.style.display = 'none';
    } else {
        fusionContainer.style.display = 'none';
        explodeBtn.style.display = 'flex';
    }
}

async function showLayerManagerModal(itemId) {
    const item = workbenchItems.get(itemId);
    if (!item) return;
    if (!layerManagerModal) return;

    layerManagerModal.style.display = 'flex';
    
    // 如果已有数据，直接渲染
    if (item.layers && Array.isArray(item.layers) && item.layers.length > 0) {
         ensureLayerPanelFooter(itemId);
         renderLayerList(item.layers, itemId);
         return;
    }

    if (layerList) layerList.innerHTML = '<div class="layer-loading"><div class="spinner"></div><p>正在扫描视觉元素...</p></div>';

    try {
        const layers = await analyzeImageLayers(item.file);
        item.layers = layers;
        workbenchItems.set(itemId, item);
        ensureLayerPanelFooter(itemId);
        renderLayerList(layers, itemId);
    } catch (e) {
        console.error("Layer analysis failed:", e);
        if (layerList) layerList.innerHTML = `<div style="padding:20px;color:red;text-align:center;font-size:12px;">分析失败: ${e.message}</div>`;
    }
}

async function analyzeImageLayers(file) {
    const base64Data = await fileToBase64(file);
    const prompt = `Analyze this image and identify 3-6 distinct distinct visual elements (foreground objects, background elements).
    Return a JSON array where each object has:
    - "name": Short Chinese name (e.g. "红沙发", "背景墙").
    - "bbox": [x, y, width, height] in PERCENTAGES (0-100).
    Example: [{"name":"沙发","bbox":[20,50,40,30]}]
    Do NOT use markdown.`;

    const response = await ai.models.generateContent({
        model: textModel, 
        contents: {
            parts: [
                { text: prompt },
                { inlineData: { data: base64Data, mimeType: file.type || 'image/png' } }
            ]
        }
    });

    const text = response.text.trim().replace(/```json|```/g, '');
    try {
        const parsed = JSON.parse(text);
        if (Array.isArray(parsed)) return parsed;
    } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
    
    // Fallback
    return [{ name: "主体", bbox: [25, 25, 50, 50] }, { name: "背景", bbox: [0, 0, 100, 100] }];
}

function renderLayerList(layers, itemId) {
            layerList.innerHTML = '';
            
            layers.forEach((layer, index) => {
                const state = getLayerState(itemId, index);
                const layerName = layer.name || layer;
                
                const el = document.createElement('div');
                el.className = 'layer-list-item';
                el.style.cssText = `
                    display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 8px 10px; 
                    border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0; transition: all 0.2s;
                    background: ${state.selected ? '#e3f2fd' : 'white'};
                    opacity: ${state.visible ? '1' : '0.5'};
                `;
                
                // 1. Checkbox
                const checkbox = document.createElement('input');
                checkbox.type = 'checkbox';
                checkbox.checked = state.selected;
                checkbox.disabled = state.locked; 
                checkbox.style.marginRight = '10px';
                checkbox.onchange = (e) => {
                    state.selected = e.target.checked;
                    renderLayerList(layers, itemId); 
                    updateFusionUI(itemId);
                };

                // 2. Name
                const nameDiv = document.createElement('div');
                nameDiv.textContent = layerName;
                nameDiv.style.flex = '1';
                nameDiv.style.fontSize = '13px';
                nameDiv.style.cursor = 'pointer';
                nameDiv.onclick = () => highlightLayerInImage(itemId, layerName, layer.bbox || [0,0,100,100], el);

                // 3. Actions
                const actionsDiv = document.createElement('div');
                actionsDiv.style.display = 'flex';
                actionsDiv.style.gap = '8px';

                // --- Eye Icon (Hide/Remove) ---
                const eyeBtn = document.createElement('button');
                eyeBtn.className = 'layer-btn';
                eyeBtn.innerHTML = `<i class="${state.visible ? 'fas fa-eye' : 'fas fa-eye-slash'}"></i>`;
                eyeBtn.title = state.visible ? "点击隐藏 (移除)" : "点击显示";
                eyeBtn.onclick = async (e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    if (state.visible) {
                        const confirmed = await showCustomConfirm(`确定要移除画面中的“${layerName}”吗？AI将自动补全背景。`);
                        if(confirmed) {
                             await performLayerAction('remove', layerName, itemId);
                        }
                    }
                };

                // --- Lock Icon (Protect) [RESTORED] ---
                const lockBtn = document.createElement('button');
                lockBtn.className = 'layer-btn';
                lockBtn.innerHTML = `<i class="${state.locked ? 'fas fa-lock' : 'fas fa-lock-open'}"></i>`;
                lockBtn.title = state.locked ? "已锁定 (保护)" : "点击锁定";
                lockBtn.style.color = state.locked ? '#e53e3e' : '#666';
                lockBtn.onclick = (e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    state.locked = !state.locked;
                    if (state.locked) state.selected = false; // Deselect if locked
                    renderLayerList(layers, itemId);
                    updateFusionUI(itemId);
                };

                // --- Extract Icon ---
                const extractBtn = document.createElement('button');
                extractBtn.className = 'layer-btn';
                extractBtn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-external-link-alt"></i>';
                extractBtn.title = "提取为完整独立图层";
                extractBtn.onclick = (e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    performLayerAction('extract', layerName, itemId, layer.bbox); 
                };

                actionsDiv.appendChild(eyeBtn);
                actionsDiv.appendChild(lockBtn); // Added back
                actionsDiv.appendChild(extractBtn);

                el.appendChild(checkbox);
                el.appendChild(nameDiv);
                el.appendChild(actionsDiv);
                
                layerList.appendChild(el);
            });
        }

        // --- Logic: Fusion Edit ---
        async function handleFusionEdit(itemId) {
            const item = workbenchItems.get(itemId);
            if (!item || !item.layers) return;
            
            const promptInput = document.getElementById('fusionEditInput');
            const promptText = promptInput.value.trim();
            if (!promptText) { alert("请输入编辑指令"); return; }

            const selectedIndices = [];
            item.layers.forEach((_, idx) => {
                if (getLayerState(itemId, idx).selected) selectedIndices.push(idx);
            });

            if (selectedIndices.length === 0) return;

            // Generate mask locally
            const maskCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
            const tempImg = new Image();
            tempImg.src = item.dataUrl;
            await new Promise(r => tempImg.onload = r);
            
            maskCanvas.width = tempImg.naturalWidth;
            maskCanvas.height = tempImg.naturalHeight;
            const ctx = maskCanvas.getContext('2d');
            ctx.fillStyle = 'black';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, maskCanvas.width, maskCanvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            const layerNames = [];

            selectedIndices.forEach(idx => {
                const layer = item.layers[idx];
                layerNames.push(layer.name);
                if (layer.bbox) {
                    const [x, y, w, h] = layer.bbox;
                    ctx.fillRect((x/100)*maskCanvas.width, (y/100)*maskCanvas.height, (w/100)*maskCanvas.width, (h/100)*maskCanvas.height);
                }
            });
            
            const maskDataUrl = maskCanvas.toDataURL('image/png');
            layerManagerModal.style.display = 'none';
            addMessage({ sender: 'bot', type: 'text', content: `🎨 **正在融合编辑**: [${layerNames.join(', ')}]\n指令: "${promptText}"` });

            try {
                const fullPrompt = `${promptText}. Change ONLY the visual appearance (color, material, style) of the selected objects. Keep the background and other objects unchanged.`;
                const result = await editOrQueryImageWithGemini(fullPrompt, item.file, [], maskDataUrl);

                if (result.success && result.imageData) {
                     const imgSrc = `data:${result.mimeType};base64,${result.imageData}`;
                     const newFile = await dataURLToFile(imgSrc, `fusion-edit-${Date.now()}.png`);
                     
                     addImageToWorkbench(newFile, `编辑: ${layerNames.join('+')}`, {
                         x: parseFloat(item.el.style.left),
                         y: parseFloat(item.el.style.top),
                         parentId: itemId
                     });
                     
                     addMessage({ sender: 'bot', type: 'text', content: '✅ 编辑完成！' });
                }
            } catch (e) {
                console.error(e);
                addMessage({ sender: 'bot', type: 'text', content: `❌ 编辑失败: ${e.message}` });
            }
        }

        // --- Highlight layer in image (Visual only) ---
// --- Highlight layer in image (Visual only) ---
        function highlightLayerInImage(itemId, layerName, bbox, listItemEl) {
            const item = workbenchItems.get(itemId);
            if (!item || !item.el) return;
            
            if (currentHighlightOverlay) { currentHighlightOverlay.remove(); currentHighlightOverlay = null; }
            
            const itemEl = item.el;
            const itemWidth = parseFloat(itemEl.style.width);
            const itemHeight = parseFloat(itemEl.style.height);
            
            const [xPercent, yPercent, widthPercent, heightPercent] = bbox;
            const x = (xPercent / 100) * itemWidth;
            const y = (yPercent / 100) * itemHeight;
            const width = (widthPercent / 100) * itemWidth;
            const height = (heightPercent / 100) * itemHeight;
            
            const overlay = document.createElement('div');
            overlay.className = 'layer-highlight-overlay';

            // ==================== 核心修复 START ====================
            // 描述: 将固定的 CSS 样式拆分，并动态计算边框宽度以补偿缩放。
            const visualBorderWidth = 2; // 这是我们期望在屏幕上看到的边框粗细（单位px）
            const adjustedBorderWidth = visualBorderWidth / workbenchZoom;

            overlay.style.position = 'absolute';
            overlay.style.left = `${x}px`;
            overlay.style.top = `${y}px`;
            overlay.style.width = `${width}px`;
            overlay.style.height = `${height}px`;
            overlay.style.background = 'rgba(33, 150, 243, 0.1)';
            overlay.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
            overlay.style.zIndex = '1001';
            overlay.style.borderRadius = '4px';
            
            // 应用动态计算后的边框样式
            overlay.style.border = `${adjustedBorderWidth}px dashed #2196F3`;
            // ==================== 核心修复 END ====================

            itemEl.appendChild(overlay);
            currentHighlightOverlay = overlay;
            
            setTimeout(() => { if (overlay) overlay.remove(); }, 3000);
        }

        // --- Robust Layer Action Logic (Single Layer) ---
    async function performLayerAction(action, layerName, itemId, bbox) {
            console.log(`[LayerAction] Triggered: ${action} on ${layerName}`);
            const item = workbenchItems.get(itemId);
            if (!item) return;  

            if(layerManagerModal) layerManagerModal.style.display = 'none';

            addMessage({ 
                sender: 'bot', 
                type: 'text', 
                content: action === 'remove' 
                    ? `👁️ **正在移除**: "${layerName}"... AI 正在计算背景补全。` 
                    : `✨ **正在提取**: "${layerName}"... AI 正在进行智能抠图与还原。` 
            });
            
            try {
                let prompt = "";
                if (action === 'remove') {
                    prompt = `Remove the object "${layerName}" from this image. Use context-aware inpainting to fill the gap seamlessly.`;
                } else {
                    // Optimized prompt for High-Fidelity Extraction & Reconstruction
                    prompt = `Critically cut out the object "${layerName}" from this image. 
                    1. STRICTLY preserve the original texture, color, lighting, and shape of the visible parts. Do NOT reimagine or change the style.
                    2. If the object is partially occluded/blocked by other items, use context-aware inpainting to reconstruct the hidden parts logically based on the visible areas, creating a WHOLE, COMPLETE object.
                    3. Place it on a purely transparent background (alpha channel).`;
                }

                const result = await editOrQueryImageWithGemini(prompt, item.file);
                
                if (result.success && result.imageData) {
                    const imgSrc = `data:${result.mimeType};base64,${result.imageData}`;
                    const prefix = action === 'remove' ? 'removed' : 'extracted';
                    const newFile = await dataURLToFile(imgSrc, `${prefix}-${Date.now()}.png`);
                    
                    const x = parseFloat(item.el.style.left) || 0;
                    const y = parseFloat(item.el.style.top) || 0;

                    if (action === 'remove') {
                        addImageToWorkbench(newFile, `移除: ${layerName}`, {
                            x: x, y: y,
                            parentId: itemId,
                            type: 'layer-remove'
                        });
                        if (item.layers) {
                            const layerIndex = item.layers.findIndex(l => (l.name || l) === layerName);
                            if (layerIndex >= 0) getLayerState(itemId, layerIndex).visible = false;
                        }
                    } else {
                        addImageToWorkbench(newFile, `提取: ${layerName}`, {
                            x: x + 60, y: y + 60,
                            parentId: itemId,
                            originalBbox: bbox, // 关键：把位置信息存进去！
                            layerName: layerName,
                            type: 'layer-extract'
                        });
                    }
                    addMessage({ sender: 'bot', type: 'text', content: `✅ **${action === 'remove' ? '移除' : '提取'}完成**！` });
                }
            } catch (e) {
                console.error("[LayerAction] Failed:", e);
                addMessage({ sender: 'bot', type: 'text', content: `❌ 操作失败: ${e.message}` });
            }
        }

                operation = await ai.operations.getVideosOperation({ operation: operation });

            const videoUri = operation.response?.generatedVideos?.[0]?.video?.uri;

        }
    };

    cancelBtn.onclick = () => {
        modal.remove();
    };
});

        // --- 核心修改：基于语义图层的物理拆解 ---
        async function triggerLayerExplosion(itemId) {
    console.log(`[Explosion] Triggered for item: ${itemId}`);
    const item = workbenchItems.get(itemId);
    if (!item) {
        alert("找不到图片对象");
        return;
    }

    // 1. 如果还没有图层数据，先自动分析
    if (!item.layers || item.layers.length === 0) {
        addMessage({ sender: 'bot', type: 'text', content: '🔍 正在分析图层结构以进行拆解...' });
        try {
            item.layers = await analyzeImageLayers(item.file);
            workbenchItems.set(itemId, item);
            // 顺便更新下 UI 面板（虽然现在是隐藏的，但为了数据一致性）
            renderLayerList(item.layers, itemId);
        } catch (e) {
            addMessage({ sender: 'bot', type: 'text', content: '❌ 无法识别图层，拆解中止。' });
            return;
        }
    }

    // 2. 准备拆解任务
    const layerNames = item.layers.map(l => l.name);
    addMessage({ 
        sender: 'bot', 
        type: 'text', 
        content: `💣 **启动语义拆解模式**\n正在将图像拆分为 **${layerNames.length}** 个独立完整图层：[${layerNames.join(', ')}]...` 
    });

    try {
        // 3. 批量生成 Promise (并行提取每个物体)
        const promises = item.layers.map(layer => {
            const prompt = `Critically cut out the object "${layer.name}" from this image. 
            1. STRICTLY preserve the original texture, color, lighting, and shape of the visible parts. Do NOT reimagine or change the style.
            2. If the object is partially occluded/blocked by other items, use context-aware inpainting to reconstruct the hidden parts logically based on the visible areas, creating a WHOLE, COMPLETE object.
            3. Place it on a purely transparent background (alpha channel).`;

            return editOrQueryImageWithGemini(prompt, item.file)
                .then(res => ({ status: 'fulfilled', value: res, layerName: layer.name }))
                .catch(err => ({ status: 'rejected', reason: err, layerName: layer.name }));
        });

        // 4. 等待所有提取完成
        const results = await Promise.all(promises);
        
        // 5. 将结果添加到工作台
        const baseX = parseFloat(item.el.style.left) || 0;
        const baseY = parseFloat(item.el.style.top) || 0;
        const itemWidth = parseFloat(item.el.style.width) || 300;
        
        let successCount = 0;

        for (let i = 0; i < results.length; i++) {
            const res = results[i];
            const layerObj = item.layers[i];
            
            if (res.status === 'fulfilled' && res.value.success && res.value.imageData) {
                const imgSrc = `data:${res.value.mimeType};base64,${res.value.imageData}`;
                const f = await dataURLToFile(imgSrc, `explode-${res.layerName}-${Date.now()}.png`);
                
                // --- 核心修复：根据当前缩放比例，放大布局间距，确保视觉上分开 ---
                const spacingFactor = 1 / workbenchZoom; // 例如: 在 20% (0.2) 缩放时, 值为 5
                
                const baseOffset = 40 * spacingFactor;
                const staggerX = 80 * spacingFactor;
                const staggerY = 60 * spacingFactor;

                // 智能排版：将拆解出的图层横向、交错排列在原图右侧
                const offsetX = itemWidth + baseOffset + (i * staggerX);
                const offsetY = (i % 2 === 0) ? -staggerY : staggerY;
                
                addImageToWorkbench(f, `拆解-${res.layerName}`, { 
                    x: baseX + offsetX, 
                    y: baseY + offsetY, 
                    parentId: itemId,
                    originalBbox: layerObj.bbox, // 关键：把位置信息存进去！
                    layerName: res.layerName,
                    type: 'layer-explode'
                });
                successCount++;
            } else {
                console.warn(`Layer extraction failed for ${res.layerName}:`, res.reason);
            }
        }

        if (successCount > 0) {
            addMessage({ sender: 'bot', type: 'text', content: `✅ **拆解完成**！成功提取并还原了 ${successCount}/${layerNames.length} 个完整图层。` });
        } else {
            addMessage({ sender: 'bot', type: 'text', content: `❌ 拆解失败，未能提取任何图层。` });
        }

    } catch (e) {
        console.error("[Explosion] Fatal error:", e);
        addMessage({ sender: 'bot', type: 'text', content: `❌ 拆解过程出错: ${e.message}` });
    }
}

                modalImg.src = e.target.src; modal.style.display = 'flex'; return;
            }
            if (e.target.id === 'imagePreviewModal') { e.target.style.display = 'none'; return; }
            const historyMenu = document.querySelector('.history-menu');
            if (historyMenu && !historyMenu.contains(e.target) && !e.target.closest('.history-more-btn')) historyMenu.remove();
            if (magicWandModal?.style.display === 'block' && !magicWandModal.contains(e.target) && !e.target.closest('#mainImagePreview')) closeMagicWandModal();
            
            // 点击外部隐藏工具箱
            if (workbenchToolbox && workbenchToolbox.style.display === 'flex' && !workbenchToolbox.contains(e.target) && !e.target.closest('.workbench-item')) {
                hideWorkbenchToolbox();
            }

            // 点击外部隐藏悬浮编辑框（双重保险）
            const floatingEditor = document.getElementById('floatingFusionEditor');
            if (floatingEditor && !floatingEditor.contains(e.target) && !e.target.closest('.workbench-item')) {
                hideFloatingFusionEditor();
            }
            
            // Click outside injection menu to close it
            if (injectionMenu && injectionMenu.classList.contains('active') && !injectionMenu.contains(e.target)) {
                 injectionMenu.classList.remove('active');
                 collisionTargetId = null;
                 injectionSourceId = null;
                 document.querySelectorAll('.collision-active').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('collision-active'));
            }
        });
        
        if (historyList) {
            historyList.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                const li = e.target.closest('li'); if (!li) return;
                const sessionId = li.dataset.sessionId;
                if (e.target.classList.contains('history-more-btn')) {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    document.querySelector('.history-menu')?.remove();
                    const menu = document.createElement('div'); menu.className = 'history-menu';
                    menu.innerHTML = `
                        <div class="history-menu-item rename" data-session-id="${sessionId}"><i class="fas fa-pencil-alt"></i> 重命名</div>
                        <div class="history-menu-item share" data-session-id="${sessionId}"><i class="fas fa-share-alt"></i> 分享</div>
                        <div class="history-menu-item delete" data-session-id="${sessionId}"><i class="fas fa-trash-alt"></i> 删除</div>
                    `;
                    menu.addEventListener('click', (menuEvent) => {
                        menuEvent.stopPropagation();
                        const actionTarget = menuEvent.target.closest('.history-menu-item');
                        if (!actionTarget) return;

                        const id = actionTarget.dataset.sessionId;

                        if (actionTarget.classList.contains('delete')) {
                            const deleteModal = document.getElementById('deleteConfirmModal');
                            const confirmBtn = document.getElementById('confirmDeleteBtn');
                            if (deleteModal && confirmBtn) {
                                confirmBtn.dataset.sessionId = id;
                                deleteModal.style.display = 'flex';
                            }
                        } else if (actionTarget.classList.contains('rename')) {
                            console.log('Rename session:', id);
                            alert('重命名功能正在开发中！');
                        } else if (actionTarget.classList.contains('share')) {
                            console.log('Share session:', id);
                            alert('分享功能正在开发中！');
                        }
                        menu.remove();
                    });
                    document.body.appendChild(menu);
                    const rect = e.target.getBoundingClientRect();
                    menu.style.cssText = `position: absolute; display: block; top: ${rect.bottom + window.scrollY}px; left: ${rect.right + window.scrollX - menu.offsetWidth}px;`;
                } else {
                    loadSession(sessionId);
                }
            });
        }

        if (chatMessages) {
            chatMessages.addEventListener('click', async (e) => {
                const selectBtn = e.target.closest('.select-image-btn');
                if (!selectBtn || isSending) return;

                const imgSrc = selectBtn.dataset.src;
                const mimeType = selectBtn.dataset.mime;
                if (!imgSrc) return;

                try {
                    isSending = true;
                    selectBtn.textContent = '已选用';
                    selectBtn.style.background = '#4CAF50';

                    const selectedFile = await dataURLToFile(imgSrc, `selected-${Date.now()}.png`);
                    
                    lastGeneratedImageForEditing = selectedFile;
                    mainImageFile = selectedFile;
                    
                    isContextPreviewHidden = false;
                    maskDataUrl = null;
                    referenceImageFiles = [];
                    pendingBaseImageShare = false;
                    pendingReferenceImageShares.clear();
                    
                    await updateImagePreview();
                    
                    const currentSession = sessions.find(s => s.id === currentSessionId);
                    const userMessage = { sender: 'user', type: 'text', content: `[ 已选用图片 ]` };
                    addMessage(userMessage);
                    if (currentSession) {
                        currentSession.messages.push(userMessage);
                        await dbHelper.saveSession(currentSession);
                    }
                    
                } catch (error) {
                    console.error("Error selecting image:", error);
                    alert("选择图片时出错，请重试。");
                } finally {
                    isSending = false;
                    updateSendBtnState();
                }
            });
        }

        if (closeMaskEditorBtn) closeMaskEditorBtn.addEventListener('click', closeMaskEditor);
        if (cancelMaskBtn) cancelMaskBtn.addEventListener('click', closeMaskEditor);
        if (applyMaskBtn) applyMaskBtn.addEventListener('click', applyMask);
        if (maskCanvasContainer) {
            maskCanvasContainer.addEventListener('mousedown', handleLassoStart);
            maskCanvasContainer.addEventListener('touchstart', handleLassoStart, { passive: false });
        }
        if (magicWandModal) {
            magicWandModal.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target.dataset.action) handleMagicWandAction(e.target.dataset.action); });
        }

        const hamburgerMenu = document.getElementById('hamburgerMenu'), mobileOverlay = document.getElementById('mobileOverlay');
        const openMobileMenu = () => { 
            if (window.innerWidth <= 1024) { 
                sidebar.classList.add('mobile-open'); 
                mobileOverlay.classList.add('active'); 
                hamburgerMenu.style.display = 'none'; 
            } 
        };
        closeMobileMenu = () => { 
            if (window.innerWidth <= 1024) { 
                sidebar.classList.remove('mobile-open'); 
                mobileOverlay.classList.remove('active'); 
                hamburgerMenu.style.display = ''; 
            } 
        };
        if (hamburgerMenu) hamburgerMenu.addEventListener('click', openMobileMenu);
        if (mobileOverlay) mobileOverlay.addEventListener('click', closeMobileMenu);

        const creditCounter = document.getElementById('creditCounter'), creditModal = document.getElementById('creditModal'), closeCreditModalBtn = document.getElementById('closeCreditModal');
        if (creditCounter && creditModal) creditCounter.addEventListener('click', () => { creditModal.style.display = 'flex'; });
        if (closeCreditModalBtn) closeCreditModalBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { creditModal.style.display = 'none'; });
        if (creditModal) creditModal.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === creditModal) creditModal.style.display = 'none'; });

        const deleteModal = document.getElementById('deleteConfirmModal');
        const closeDeleteModalBtn = document.getElementById('closeDeleteModal');
        const cancelDeleteBtn = document.getElementById('cancelDeleteBtn');
        const confirmDeleteBtn = document.getElementById('confirmDeleteBtn');

        const hideDeleteModal = () => {
            if (deleteModal) deleteModal.style.display = 'none';
        };

        if (closeDeleteModalBtn) closeDeleteModalBtn.addEventListener('click', hideDeleteModal);
        if (cancelDeleteBtn) cancelDeleteBtn.addEventListener('click', hideDeleteModal);
        if (deleteModal) {
            deleteModal.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                if (e.target === deleteModal) {
                    hideDeleteModal();
                }
            });
        }

        if (confirmDeleteBtn) {
            confirmDeleteBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
                const idToDelete = confirmDeleteBtn.dataset.sessionId;
                if (idToDelete) {
                    await dbHelper.deleteSession(idToDelete);
                    sessions = sessions.filter(s => s.id !== idToDelete);
                    chatSessionsCache.delete(idToDelete);
                    if (currentSessionId === idToDelete) await startNewSession();
                    renderHistoryList();
                }
                hideDeleteModal();
            });
        }
    }
