// 新增键盘快捷键监听
function setupKeyboardShortcuts() {
    document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
        // Ctrl/Cmd + 加号放大
        if ((e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) && (e.key === '+' || e.key === '=')) {
            e.preventDefault();
            zoomIn();
        }
        // Ctrl/Cmd + 减号缩小
        if ((e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) && e.key === '-') {
            e.preventDefault();
            zoomOut();
        }
        // Ctrl/Cmd + 0 重置
        if ((e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) && e.key === '0') {
            e.preventDefault();
            resetZoom();
        }
    });
}

// 修改现有的 zoomIn 函数
function zoomIn() {
    const newZoom = workbenchZoom * 1.2;
    applyWorkbenchZoom(Math.min(ZOOM_MAX, newZoom));
}

// 修改现有的 zoomOut 函数  
function zoomOut() {
    const newZoom = workbenchZoom * 0.8;
    applyWorkbenchZoom(Math.max(ZOOM_MIN, newZoom));
}

// 修改现有的 resetZoom 函数
function resetZoom() {
    // 原来的逻辑可能是设为 1，现在直接重置到默认状态（20%且居中）
    resetPan(); 
}

// 初始化画布拖拽功能
function initWorkbenchPan() {
    // 监听鼠标中键按下
    workbenchGrid.addEventListener('mousedown', handlePanStart);
    
    // 监听鼠标移动
    document.addEventListener('mousemove', handlePanMove);
    
    // 监听鼠标释放
    document.addEventListener('mouseup', handlePanEnd);
    
    // 阻止中键默认行为（防止页面滚动）
    workbenchGrid.addEventListener('auxclick', (e) => {
        if (e.button === 1) { // 中键
            e.preventDefault();
        }
    });
}

// 开始拖拽画布
function handlePanStart(e) {
    // 中键按下或空格键+左键
    if (e.button === 1 || (e.button === 0 && e.shiftKey)) {
        e.preventDefault();
        isPanning = true;
        panStartX = e.clientX - panOffsetX * workbenchZoom;
        panStartY = e.clientY - panOffsetY * workbenchZoom;
        
        // 添加拖拽样式
        workbenchGrid.classList.add('panning');
        
        // 阻止文本选择
        document.body.style.userSelect = 'none';
    }
}

// 拖拽画布移动
function handlePanMove(e) {
    if (!isPanning) return;
    e.preventDefault();

    // 计算缩放补偿后的位移（反向调整）
    const deltaX = (e.clientX - panStartX) / workbenchZoom;
    const deltaY = (e.clientY - panStartY) / workbenchZoom;

    // 更新偏移量
    panOffsetX = deltaX;
    panOffsetY = deltaY;

    applyPanTransform();
}


// 结束拖拽画布
function handlePanEnd(e) {
    if (!isPanning) return;
    
    isPanning = false;
    workbenchGrid.classList.remove('panning');
    document.body.style.userSelect = '';
}

// 修改applyPanTransform函数
function applyPanTransform() {
    workbenchZoomContainer.style.transform = `
        translate(${panOffsetX * workbenchZoom}px, ${panOffsetY * workbenchZoom}px)
        scale(${workbenchZoom})
    `;
    updateBackgroundGrid(); // 平移时也更新背景
}

// 重置画布位置
function resetPan() {
    const CANVAS_CENTER = 50000;
    const DEFAULT_ZOOM = 0.2; // 默认缩放 20%
    const viewport = document.getElementById('workbench');
    
    // 设置缩放比例为默认值
    workbenchZoom = DEFAULT_ZOOM;
    updateZoomIndicator();

    if (viewport) {
        // 核心逻辑更新：计算偏移量，使视口中心在特定缩放比例下对准画布中心
        const viewportW = viewport.clientWidth || window.innerWidth;
        const viewportH = viewport.clientHeight || window.innerHeight;
        
        // 计算公式：(屏幕中心 / 缩放比例) - 画布中心
        panOffsetX = (viewportW / 2) / workbenchZoom - CANVAS_CENTER;
        panOffsetY = (viewportH / 2) / workbenchZoom - CANVAS_CENTER;
    } else {
        panOffsetX = -CANVAS_CENTER;
        panOffsetY = -CANVAS_CENTER;
    }
    
    applyPanTransform();
    updateWorkbenchItemsScale();
}
// === 新增：坐标转换函数 ===
function screenToWorkbenchCoord(screenX, screenY) {
    const containerRect = workbenchZoomContainer.getBoundingClientRect();
    const physicalX = screenX - containerRect.left;
    const physicalY = screenY - containerRect.top;
    const logicalX = physicalX / workbenchZoom;
    const logicalY = physicalY / workbenchZoom;
    return { x: logicalX, y: logicalY };
}


    // 修改 setupSelectionBox 中的初始坐标记录
function setupSelectionBox() {
    workbenchGrid.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
        if (e.button === 1 || e.shiftKey) return;
        if (e.target !== workbenchGrid || e.button !== 0) return;
        if (e.target.classList.contains('world-connector') || e.target.classList.contains('outpaint-handle') || e.target.closest('.workbench-item.atmosphere-node')) return; // 防止与世界构建工具冲突
        
        workbenchGrid.classList.add('selecting');
        isSelecting = true;
        
        // === 修改后 ===
        selectionStart = screenToWorkbenchCoord(e.clientX, e.clientY);
        
        if (!isCtrlPressed) {
            document.querySelectorAll('.workbench-item').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('selected'));
            selectedWorkbenchItems.clear();
        }
        
        selectionBox = document.createElement('div');
        selectionBox.className = 'selection-box';

        // 根据缩放比例调整边框宽度
        const baseBorderWidth = 2; // 基础边框宽度（100%缩放时）
        const adjustedBorderWidth = baseBorderWidth / workbenchZoom;
        selectionBox.style.borderWidth = `${adjustedBorderWidth}px`;
        workbenchGrid.appendChild(selectionBox);
    });

        // 修改鼠标移动事件，避免与拖拽冲突
        // 修改鼠标移动事件
document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
    if (isPanning) {
        handlePanMove(e);
        return;
    }
    
    if (!isSelecting) return;
    
    const rect = workbenchGrid.getBoundingClientRect();
    
    // 直接使用屏幕坐标计算选择框显示
    // === 修改后 ===
const start = selectionStart; // 已经是逻辑坐标
const current = screenToWorkbenchCoord(e.clientX, e.clientY);

const left = Math.min(start.x, current.x);
const top = Math.min(start.y, current.y);
const width = Math.abs(current.x - start.x);
const height = Math.abs(current.y - start.y);
    
if (selectionBox) {
    const baseBorderWidth = 2;
    const adjustedBorderWidth = baseBorderWidth / workbenchZoom;
    selectionBox.style.borderWidth = `${adjustedBorderWidth}px`;
    
    selectionBox.style.left = `${left}px`;
    selectionBox.style.top = `${top}px`;
    selectionBox.style.width = `${width}px`;
    selectionBox.style.height = `${height}px`;
}
    
    // === 修改后 ===
updateSelectedItems(left, top, width, height);
});

document.addEventListener('mouseup', (e) => {
    if (isSelecting) {
        isSelecting = false;
        workbenchGrid.classList.remove('selecting');
        if (selectionBox) {
            workbenchGrid.removeChild(selectionBox);
            selectionBox = null;
        }
        handleSelectedItems();
    }
    
    if (isPanning) {
        handlePanEnd(e);
    }
});
}


    // === 修改后 ===
function updateSelectedItems(left, top, width, height) {
    // 现在传入的坐标已经是逻辑坐标，无需再次缩放
    const selectionRect = { 
        left: left, 
        top: top, 
        right: left + width, 
        bottom: top + height 
    };
    
    document.querySelectorAll('.workbench-item').forEach(item => {
        // Skip atmosphere nodes for rectangle selection to avoid clutter
        if (item.classList.contains('atmosphere-node')) return;

        const itemRect = item.getBoundingClientRect();
        const containerRect = workbenchZoomContainer.getBoundingClientRect();
        
        // 统一基准：都使用容器的坐标
        const itemLeft = (itemRect.left - containerRect.left) / workbenchZoom;
        const itemTop = (itemRect.top - containerRect.top) / workbenchZoom;
        const itemRight = itemLeft + (itemRect.width / workbenchZoom);
        const itemBottom = itemTop + (itemRect.height / workbenchZoom);
        
        const isIntersecting = !(itemRight < selectionRect.left || 
                                itemLeft > selectionRect.right || 
                                itemBottom < selectionRect.top || 
                                itemTop > selectionRect.bottom);
        
        if (isIntersecting) {
            item.classList.add('selected');
            selectedWorkbenchItems.add(item.dataset.itemId);
        } else if (!isCtrlPressed) {
            item.classList.remove('selected');
            selectedWorkbenchItems.delete(item.dataset.itemId);
        }
    });
}




    // 删除选中项的函数
    async function deleteSelectedItems() {
        if (selectedWorkbenchItems.size === 0) return;
        
        const confirmed = await showCustomConfirm(`确定要删除选中的 ${selectedWorkbenchItems.size} 张图片吗？`);
        if (confirmed) {
            // 创建副本避免迭代时修改集合
            const itemsToDelete = new Set(selectedWorkbenchItems);
            itemsToDelete.forEach(id => {
                deleteWorkbenchItem(id, true); // Pass skipConfirm flag
            });
            selectedWorkbenchItems.clear();
        }
    }

    // --- Genealogy Logic ---

    function drawGenealogyConnections() {
        // Clear existing paths (except defs)
        const defs = genealogyLayer.querySelector('defs');
        genealogyLayer.innerHTML = '';
        if(defs) genealogyLayer.appendChild(defs);

        workbenchItems.forEach((item, id) => {
            if (item.genealogy && item.genealogy.parents && item.genealogy.parents.length > 0) {
                item.genealogy.parents.forEach(parentId => {
                    const parentItem = workbenchItems.get(parentId);
                    if (parentItem) {
                        drawConnectionPath(parentItem, item, item.genealogy);
                    }
                });
            }
        });
    }

    function drawConnectionPath(parent, child, genealogyData) {
        const pRect = {
            x: parseFloat(parent.el.style.left),
            y: parseFloat(parent.el.style.top),
            w: parseFloat(parent.el.style.width),
            h: parseFloat(parent.el.style.height)
        };
        const cRect = {
            x: parseFloat(child.el.style.left),
            y: parseFloat(child.el.style.top),
            w: parseFloat(child.el.style.width),
            h: parseFloat(child.el.style.height)
        };

        // Calculate center points
        const startX = pRect.x + pRect.w / 2;
        const startY = pRect.y + pRect.h / 2;
        const endX = cRect.x + cRect.w / 2;
        const endY = cRect.y + cRect.h / 2;

        // Create Bezier Curve
        const path = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "path");
        path.classList.add("genealogy-path");
        
        // Dynamic control points based on relative position
        const deltaX = endX - startX;
        const deltaY = endY - startY;
        
        // If child is mostly to the right, curve horizontally. If mostly below, curve vertically.
        let cp1x, cp1y, cp2x, cp2y;
        
        if (Math.abs(deltaX) > Math.abs(deltaY)) {
            // Horizontal layout
            const offset = Math.abs(deltaX) * 0.5;
            cp1x = startX + offset;
            cp1y = startY;
            cp2x = endX - offset;
            cp2y = endY;
        } else {
            // Vertical layout
            const offset = Math.abs(deltaY) * 0.5;
            cp1x = startX;
            cp1y = startY + offset;
            cp2x = endX;
            cp2y = endY - offset;
        }

        const d = `M ${startX} ${startY} C ${cp1x} ${cp1y}, ${cp2x} ${cp2y}, ${endX} ${endY}`;
        path.setAttribute("d", d);
        path.setAttribute("marker-end", "url(#arrowhead)");
        
        // Add data for interaction
        path.dataset.childId = child.el.dataset.itemId;
        path.dataset.parentId = parent.el.dataset.itemId;
        
        // Double click to rewind/edit
        path.addEventListener('dblclick', (e) => {
            e.stopPropagation();
            openGenealogyModifier(child.el.dataset.itemId, parent.el.dataset.itemId, genealogyData);
        });
        
        // Hover effect for marker color
        path.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => path.setAttribute("marker-end", "url(#arrowhead-active)"));
        path.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => path.setAttribute("marker-end", "url(#arrowhead)"));

        genealogyLayer.appendChild(path);
    }

    async function openGenealogyModifier(childId, parentId, genealogyData) {
        const childItem = workbenchItems.get(childId);
        if (!childItem) return;

        // Custom simple modal for prompt editing
        const prompt = genealogyData.prompt || "No prompt data available.";
        
        // Create modal on the fly
        const modal = document.createElement('div');
        modal.style.cssText = `
            position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.6); z-index: 10002; display: flex;
            align-items: center; justify-content: center;
        `;
        
        modal.innerHTML = `
            <div style="background: white; padding: 24px; border-radius: 12px; width: 400px; box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);">
                <h3 style="margin-top:0; color:var(--primary-color);">🧬 基因回溯修改</h3>
                <p style="font-size:13px; color:#666; margin-bottom:10px;">修改当时生成这张图的参数（Prompt），重新演化。</p>
                <textarea id="genealogyPrompt" style="width:100%; height:100px; padding:10px; border:1px solid #ddd; border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:15px; font-family:inherit;">${prompt}</textarea>
                <div style="display:flex; justify-content:flex-end; gap:10px;">
                    <button id="closeGenealogy" style="padding:8px 16px; background:#f0f4f8; border:none; border-radius:6px; cursor:pointer;">取消</button>
                    <button id="applyGenealogy" style="padding:8px 16px; background:var(--primary-color); color:white; border:none; border-radius:6px; cursor:pointer;">重新生成 (Regenerate)</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        `;
        
        document.body.appendChild(modal);
        
        document.getElementById('closeGenealogy').onclick = () => modal.remove();
        
        document.getElementById('applyGenealogy').onclick = async () => {
            const newPrompt = document.getElementById('genealogyPrompt').value;
            modal.remove();
            
            // Trigger Regeneration
            const loadingId = addImageToWorkbench(childItem.file, 'Updating...', { x: parseFloat(childItem.el.style.left), y: parseFloat(childItem.el.style.top) });
            // Remove old item effectively (or replace it later). For now, let's keep it until new one arrives or just indicate loading on it.
            // Better: Show loading on the child item.
            
            const childEl = childItem.el;
            childEl.style.opacity = '0.5';
            const spinner = document.createElement('div');
            spinner.className = 'spinner';
            spinner.style.position = 'absolute'; spinner.style.top = '50%'; spinner.style.left = '50%';
            childEl.appendChild(spinner);

            try {
                // Determine parents files
                const parentItem = workbenchItems.get(parentId);
                const refImages = parentItem ? [parentItem.file] : [];
                
                // Assuming it was an edit/injection task. We re-run the edit.
                // Note: Logic implies we treat parent as base or ref depending on original action.
                // For simplicity, we assume parent is base for direct mutations, or ref for composite.
                // Let's assume parentId is the BASE image for now if parents.length === 1
                
                const result = await editOrQueryImageWithGemini(newPrompt, parentItem.file);
                
                if (result.success && result.imageData) {
                    const imgSrc = `data:${result.mimeType};base64,${result.imageData}`;
                    const newFile = await dataURLToFile(imgSrc, `evolved-${Date.now()}.png`);
                    
                    // Update the existing item data
                    childItem.file = newFile;
                    childItem.dataUrl = imgSrc;
                    childEl.querySelector('img').src = imgSrc;
                    
                    // Update genealogy data
                    childItem.genealogy.prompt = newPrompt;
                    
                    // Cleanup
                    childEl.style.opacity = '1';
                    spinner.remove();
                    
                    // Flash effect
                    childEl.style.boxShadow = "0 0 20px #4CAF50";
                    setTimeout(() => childEl.style.boxShadow = "", 1000);
                    
                    addMessage({ sender: 'bot', type: 'text', content: '🧬 基因节点已更新：图像重新生成完成。' });
                }
            } catch (err) {
                console.error(err);
                alert("重新生成失败: " + err.message);
                childEl.style.opacity = '1';
                spinner.remove();
            }
        };
    }

    // --- Modify addImageToWorkbench to support Genealogy tracking & Resizing ---
// ==================== 核心修改 START (2/4) ====================
// 描述: 修改addImageToWorkbench，确保新图片添加后：
//      1. 它的手柄和箭头被立刻正确地进行“视觉补偿”，而不是等待下一次缩放。
//      2. 它的初始自动布局间距根据20%的缩放比例进行了放大，防止新图叠在一起。
function addImageToWorkbench(file, label = '', metadata = {}) {
    const id = `item-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
    const wrapper = document.createElement('div');
    wrapper.className = 'workbench-item';
    wrapper.dataset.itemId = id;
    
    fileToWorkbenchIdMap.set(file, id);

    fileToDataURL(file).then(dataUrl => {
        return new Promise((resolve) => {
            const img = new Image();
            img.onload = () => {
                let finalWidth, finalHeight;

                // --- 核心修改：优先使用传入的尺寸 ---
                if (metadata.initialWidth && metadata.initialHeight) {
                    finalWidth = metadata.initialWidth;
                    finalHeight = metadata.initialHeight;
                } else {
                    // 如果没有提供，则使用原始的缩放逻辑作为备用方案
                    const maxSize = 600;
                    let width = img.naturalWidth;
                    let height = img.naturalHeight;
                    const ratio = Math.min(maxSize / width, maxSize / height);
                    finalWidth = width * ratio;
                    finalHeight = height * ratio;
                }
                // --- 修改结束 ---

                wrapper.dataset.aspectRatio = finalWidth / finalHeight;
                wrapper.style.width = `${finalWidth}px`;
                wrapper.style.height = `${finalHeight}px`;
                
                let posX, posY;
                if (metadata && metadata.x !== undefined && metadata.y !== undefined) {
                    posX = metadata.x;
                    posY = metadata.y;
                } else {
                    const gridSize = 100;
                    const itemsPerColumn = 3; 
                    const col = Math.floor(window.workbenchItemCount / itemsPerColumn);
                    const row = window.workbenchItemCount % itemsPerColumn;
                    
                    const CANVAS_CENTER = 50000;
                    const itemSizeForLayout = finalWidth > 0 ? finalWidth : 600; // Use a fallback size for layout
                    posX = CANVAS_CENTER + col * (itemSizeForLayout + gridSize) - itemSizeForLayout;
                    posY = CANVAS_CENTER + row * (itemSizeForLayout + gridSize) - itemSizeForLayout;
                }

                wrapper.style.left = `${posX}px`;
                wrapper.style.top = `${posY}px`;
                
                window.workbenchItemCount = (window.workbenchItemCount || 0) + 1;
                
                resolve({ dataUrl, width: finalWidth, height: finalHeight });
            };
            img.src = dataUrl;
        });
    }).then(({ dataUrl }) => {
        
        const genealogy = {
            parents: [],
            prompt: metadata.generationParams?.prompt || '',
            action: metadata.type || 'upload'
        };
        
        if (metadata.parentId) genealogy.parents.push(metadata.parentId);
        if (metadata.styleParentId) genealogy.parents.push(metadata.styleParentId);
        
        workbenchItems.set(id, { 
            file, dataUrl, el: wrapper, 
            genealogy: genealogy, 
            ...metadata 
        });
        
        wrapper.innerHTML = `<img src="${dataUrl}" alt="${label}">`;
        
        ['nw', 'ne', 'sw', 'se'].forEach(dir => {
            const handle = document.createElement('div');
            handle.className = `resize-handle resize-${dir}`;
            handle.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => handleResizeStart(e, dir, wrapper));
            wrapper.appendChild(handle);
        });

        const directions = [
            { dir: 'top', icon: 'fas fa-arrow-up' },
            { dir: 'bottom', icon: 'fas fa-arrow-down' },
            { dir: 'left', icon: 'fas fa-arrow-left' },
            { dir: 'right', icon: 'fas fa-arrow-right' }
        ];
        directions.forEach(d => {
            const handle = document.createElement('div');
            handle.className = `outpaint-handle handle-${d.dir}`;
            handle.innerHTML = `<i class="${d.icon}"></i>`;
            handle.title = '按住拖拽以延展画面';
            handle.onmousedown = (e) => {
                e.stopPropagation();
                startOutpaintDrag(e, id, d.dir, wrapper);
            };
            wrapper.appendChild(handle);
        });

        workbenchGrid.appendChild(wrapper);
        document.querySelector('.empty-workbench-state')?.remove();

        const inverseScale = 1 / workbenchZoom;
        wrapper.querySelectorAll('.resize-handle').forEach(h => h.style.transform = `scale(${inverseScale})`);
        wrapper.querySelectorAll('.outpaint-handle').forEach(h => {
            if (h.classList.contains('handle-top') || h.classList.contains('handle-bottom')) {
                h.style.transform = `translateX(-50%) scale(${inverseScale})`;
            } else {
                h.style.transform = `translateY(-50%) scale(${inverseScale})`;
            }
        });
        
        let startX = 0;
        let startY = 0;

        wrapper.addEventListener('wheel', (e) => {
            if (e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) {
                e.preventDefault();
                const delta = e.deltaY > 0 ? -1 : 1;
                const newZoom = workbenchZoom + (delta * ZOOM_STEP);
                applyWorkbenchZoom(Math.max(ZOOM_MIN, Math.min(ZOOM_MAX, newZoom)), e);
            }
        }, { passive: false });

        wrapper.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
            if (e.target.classList.contains('resize-handle')) return;
            if (e.button !== 0 || e.target.classList.contains('outpaint-handle')) return;
            
            startX = e.clientX;
            startY = e.clientY;
            handleWorkbenchDragStart(e);
        });

        wrapper.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
            if (event.target.closest('.sticky-note')) return;
            event.stopPropagation();
            if (event.target.classList.contains('outpaint-handle')) return;
            if (event.target.classList.contains('resize-handle')) return;
            
            const diffX = Math.abs(event.clientX - startX);
            const diffY = Math.abs(event.clientY - startY);

            if (diffX < 5 && diffY < 5) {
                showWorkbenchToolbox(id, event.clientX, event.clientY);
                document.querySelectorAll('.workbench-item').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('selected'));
                wrapper.classList.add('selected');
            }
        });
        
        requestAnimationFrame(drawGenealogyConnections);
        checkProximity(id);
    });
    
    return id;
}
// ==================== 核心修改 END (2/4) ====================

     // --- Resize Logic Implementation ---
     let isResizing = false;
     let resizeState = null;

     function handleResizeStart(e, direction, itemEl) {
        e.stopPropagation(); // Prevent workbench drag or selection
        e.preventDefault(); // Prevent text selection

        isResizing = true;
        
        // Record initial state
        resizeState = {
            direction: direction,
            itemEl: itemEl,
            startX: e.clientX,
            startY: e.clientY,
            startWidth: parseFloat(itemEl.style.width),
            startHeight: parseFloat(itemEl.style.height),
            startLeft: parseFloat(itemEl.style.left),
            startTop: parseFloat(itemEl.style.top),
            aspectRatio: parseFloat(itemEl.dataset.aspectRatio) || 1
        };

        document.addEventListener('mousemove', handleResizeMove);
        document.addEventListener('mouseup', handleResizeEnd);
    }

    function handleResizeMove(e) {
        if (!isResizing || !resizeState) return;
        e.preventDefault();

        const { direction, itemEl, startX, startWidth, startLeft, startTop, aspectRatio } = resizeState;
        
        // Calculate delta. Use workbenchZoom (default 1) to correct for canvas zoom
        const zoom = (typeof workbenchZoom !== 'undefined') ? workbenchZoom : 1;
        const deltaX = (e.clientX - startX) / zoom;
        
        const MIN_WIDTH = 30;
        
        let newWidth = startWidth;
        let newHeight = 0;
        let newLeft = startLeft;
        let newTop = startTop;

        // Logic for different handles
        if (direction === 'se') {
            // South-East: Change Width, Height auto
            newWidth = Math.max(MIN_WIDTH, startWidth + deltaX);
        } else if (direction === 'sw') {
            // South-West: Change Width, Left adjusts
            newWidth = Math.max(MIN_WIDTH, startWidth - deltaX);
            // Compensate Left: newLeft = oldLeft + (oldWidth - newWidth)
            newLeft = startLeft + (startWidth - newWidth);
        } else if (direction === 'ne') {
            // North-East: Change Width, Top adjusts
            newWidth = Math.max(MIN_WIDTH, startWidth + deltaX);
        } else if (direction === 'nw') {
            // North-West: Change Width, Left and Top adjust
            newWidth = Math.max(MIN_WIDTH, startWidth - deltaX);
            newLeft = startLeft + (startWidth - newWidth);
        }

        // Force Aspect Ratio for Height
        newHeight = newWidth / aspectRatio;

        // Compensate Top for North handles
        if (direction === 'ne' || direction === 'nw') {
            const startHeight = resizeState.startHeight;
            newTop = startTop + (startHeight - newHeight);
        }

        // Apply Styles
        itemEl.style.width = `${newWidth}px`;
        itemEl.style.height = `${newHeight}px`;
        itemEl.style.left = `${newLeft}px`;
        itemEl.style.top = `${newTop}px`;

        // Update Connections
        if (typeof drawGenealogyConnections === 'function') {
            requestAnimationFrame(drawGenealogyConnections);
        }
    }

        function handleResizeEnd() {
        isResizing = false;
        
        // 获取被缩放图片的ID
        let resizedItemId = null;
        if (resizeState && resizeState.itemEl) {
            resizedItemId = resizeState.itemEl.dataset.itemId;
        }
        
        resizeState = null;
        document.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleResizeMove);
        document.removeEventListener('mouseup', handleResizeEnd);
        
        // 更新连接器位置
        if (resizedItemId) {
            checkProximity(resizedItemId);
        }
    }


    // 显示工具箱浮窗
    function showWorkbenchToolbox(id, x, y) {
        currentActiveWorkbenchItemId = id;
        const item = workbenchItems.get(id);
        if (!item) return;

        // 1. 显示常规圆形工具箱
        workbenchToolbox.style.display = 'flex';
        const toolboxWidth = 280; 
        const toolboxHeight = 60;
        
        let posX = x - toolboxWidth / 2;
        let posY = y - toolboxHeight - 15;
        
        if (posX < 10) posX = 10;
        if (posX + toolboxWidth > window.innerWidth - 10) posX = window.innerWidth - toolboxWidth - 10;
        if (posY < 10) posY = y + 15; 
        
        workbenchToolbox.style.left = `${posX}px`;
        workbenchToolbox.style.top = `${posY}px`;

        // 2. 核心逻辑：如果是拆解出来的子图（有 parentId、originalBbox 且 type 为 'layer-explode'），则弹出融合编辑框
        if (item.parentId && item.originalBbox && item.type === 'layer-explode') {
            // 传入坐标，显示在工具箱下方
            showFloatingFusionEditor(id, posX, posY + toolboxHeight + 10, toolboxWidth);
        } else {
            hideFloatingFusionEditor();
        }
    }


    function hideWorkbenchToolbox() {
        workbenchToolbox.style.display = 'none';
        currentActiveWorkbenchItemId = null;
        // 关键：在这里也调用隐藏悬浮框
        if (typeof hideFloatingFusionEditor === 'function') {
            hideFloatingFusionEditor();
        }
    }


    async function deleteWorkbenchItem(id, skipConfirm = false) {
        const performDelete = () => {
            const item = workbenchItems.get(id);
            if (item && item.el) {
                item.el.remove();
            }
            workbenchItems.delete(id);
            selectedWorkbenchItems.delete(id);
            
            // Remove any associated connectors
            checkProximity(id); 
            // Re-draw connections
            drawGenealogyConnections();

            if (workbenchItems.size === 0) {
                const emptyState = document.createElement('div');
                emptyState.className = 'empty-workbench-state';
                emptyState.innerHTML = `<i class="fas fa-image"></i><p>上传或生成的图片将出现在这里</p>`;
                workbenchGrid.appendChild(emptyState);
            }
        };
        
        if (skipConfirm) {
            performDelete();
        } else {
            const confirmed = await showCustomConfirm('确定要从工作台删除这张图片吗？');
            if (confirmed) {
                performDelete();
            }
        }
    }


    function selectWorkbenchItem(id) {
        const item = workbenchItems.get(id);
        if (!item) return;
        
        if (!isCtrlPressed) {
            // 如果不是多选模式，清除所有选中状态
            document.querySelectorAll('.workbench-item').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('selected'));
            selectedWorkbenchItems.clear();
        }
        
        // 切换当前项的选中状态
        const itemEl = document.querySelector(`.workbench-item[data-item-id="${id}"]`);
        if (itemEl.classList.contains('selected')) {
            itemEl.classList.remove('selected');
            selectedWorkbenchItems.delete(id);
        } else {
            itemEl.classList.add('selected');
            selectedWorkbenchItems.add(id);
        }
        
        // 处理选中项
        handleSelectedItems();
    }



    function handleSelectedItems() {
        if (selectedWorkbenchItems.size === 0) return;
        
        const selectedItems = Array.from(selectedWorkbenchItems).map(id => workbenchItems.get(id));
        
        if (selectedItems.length > 0) {
            if (mainImageFile) {
                // 已经有主图，所有选中项都作为参考图
                selectedItems.forEach(item => {
                    if (item.file !== mainImageFile && !referenceImageFiles.includes(item.file)) {
                        referenceImageFiles.push(item.file);
                        pendingReferenceImageShares.add(item.file);
                    }
                });
            } else {
                // 没有主图，第一个选中项作为主图，其他作为参考图
                const [firstItem, ...otherItems] = selectedItems;
                
                mainImageFile = firstItem.file;
                pendingBaseImageShare = true;
                
                otherItems.forEach(item => {
                    if (!referenceImageFiles.includes(item.file)) {
                        referenceImageFiles.push(item.file);
                        pendingReferenceImageShares.add(item.file);
                    }
                });
            }
            
            updateImagePreview();
            updateSendBtnState();
        }
    }


    async function clearWorkbench() {
        if (workbenchItems.size === 0) return;
        const confirmed = await showCustomConfirm('确定要清空整个工作台吗？');
        if (!confirmed) return;
        workbenchItems.clear();
        window.workbenchItemCount = 0;
        
        // 1. 清空 Grid (缩放层) - 保留必要的辅助线和 SVG 层
        workbenchGrid.innerHTML = `
            <div id="lightConnector" class="light-connector"></div>
            <div id="vLine" class="guide-line v"></div>
            <div id="hLine" class="guide-line h"></div>
            <div id="guide-v" class="guide-line guide-line-v"></div>
            <div id="guide-h" class="guide-line guide-line-h"></div>
            <svg id="genealogyLayer" class="genealogy-layer">
                <defs>
                    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto"><polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#cbd5e0"/></marker>
                    <marker id="arrowhead-active" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto"><polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#2A5C82"/></marker>
                </defs>
            </svg>
        `;

        // 2. 添加空状态到 Viewport (视口层)，确保不会被缩放
        if (!document.querySelector('.empty-workbench-state')) {
            const emptyState = document.createElement('div');
            emptyState.className = 'empty-workbench-state';
            emptyState.innerHTML = `<i class="fas fa-image"></i><p>上传或生成的图片将出现在这里</p><p style="font-size: 12px; margin-top: 10px;">拖拽图片重叠可触发融合反应</p>`;
            document.getElementById('workbench').appendChild(emptyState);
        }
    }

     async function addWatermark(imageDataUrl) {
        return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
            const img = new Image();
            img.onload = () => {
                const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
                const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
                canvas.width = img.naturalWidth;
                canvas.height = img.naturalHeight;
                ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0);
                const fontSize = Math.max(12, Math.min(canvas.width * 0.03, 60));
                ctx.font = `normal ${fontSize}px 'Arial', sans-serif`;
                ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7)';
                ctx.textAlign = 'right';
                ctx.textBaseline = 'bottom';
                const padding = canvas.width * 0.02;
                ctx.fillText('摹图', canvas.width - padding, canvas.height - padding);
                resolve(canvas.toDataURL('image/png'));
            };
            img.onerror = (err) => {
                console.error("Failed to load image for watermarking:", err);
                reject(new Error('Image could not be loaded for watermarking.'));
            };
            img.src = imageDataUrl;
        });
    }

    // --- Core Functions ---
    
     async function generateSessionTitle(prompt) {
        if (!prompt || prompt.trim().length === 0) {
            return '图片对话';
        }
        try {
            const titlePrompt = `请将以下用户指令总结为一个不超过8个字的、简短精炼的中文标题。请只返回标题本身，不要添加任何多余的解释或标点符号。\n\n用户指令：“${prompt}”`;
            
            const response = await ai.models.generateContent({
                model: textModel,
                contents: [{ text: titlePrompt }]
            });

            let title = response.text.trim().replace(/["'“”‘’]/g, '');
            return title || prompt.substring(0, 20);
        } catch (error) {
            console.error("生成智能标题失败:", error);
            return prompt.substring(0, 20);
        }
    }

    function buildMessageContentHTML(message) {
        let html = '';
        
        // Support html type for agent debate
        if (message.type === 'html' && message.content) {
            return message.content;
        }
        
        if (message.content) {
            html += `<div class="message-text">${marked.parse(message.content)}</div>`;
        }

        if (message.imageData) {
            if (Array.isArray(message.imageData)) {
                html += '<div class="image-grid-container">';
                message.imageData.forEach((imgData, index) => {
                    if (!imgData.src) return;
                    html += `
                        <div class="grid-item">
                            <img src="${imgData.src}" class="image-message" alt="Generated variation ${index + 1}">
                            <button class="select-image-btn" data-src="${imgData.src}" data-mime="${imgData.mimeType}">
                                选用此图
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    `;
                });
                html += '</div>';
            } else if (message.imageData.src) {
                html += `<div class="message-image"><img src="${message.imageData.src}" class="image-message" alt="Generated or uploaded content"></div>`;
            }
        } else if (message.type === 'image' && message.imageData?.src) {
             html = `<div class="message-image"><img src="${message.imageData.src}" class="image-message" alt="Generated or uploaded content"></div>`;
        }

        return `<div class="message-content">${html || '<div></div>'}</div>`;
    }

    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
        window.buildMessageContentHTML = buildMessageContentHTML;
    }

    function addMessage(message) {
        const { sender } = message;
        const messageDiv = document.createElement('div');
        messageDiv.className = `message ${sender}-message`;
        
        const botAvatar = `<img src="https://www.marmoai.cn/images/avatars/WeChat84b8e05cc8464bb089de1c46bed38809.jpg" alt="小M" style="width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%; flex-shrink: 0;">`;
        const htmlContent = buildMessageContentHTML(message);
        
        messageDiv.innerHTML = sender === 'bot' ? botAvatar + htmlContent : htmlContent;
        
        chatMessages.appendChild(messageDiv);
        chatMessages.scrollTop = chatMessages.scrollHeight;
        return messageDiv;
    }
    
    function renderMessages(messages) {
        chatMessages.innerHTML = '';
        messages.forEach(msg => addMessage(msg));
    }
    
    const fileToDataURL = (file) => {
        return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
            const reader = new FileReader();
            reader.readAsDataURL(file);
            reader.onload = () => resolve(reader.result);
            reader.onerror = reject;
        });
    };
    
    const dataURLToFile = async (dataUrl, filename) => {
        const res = await fetch(dataUrl);
        const blob = await res.blob();
        return new File([blob], filename, { type: blob.type });
    };
    
    const fileToBase64 = (file) => fileToDataURL(file).then(url => url.split(',')[1]);

    // --- Latent Canvas Functions ---
    function setupLatentCanvas() {
        if (!latentSketchCanvas) return;
        
        latentState.ctx = latentSketchCanvas.getContext('2d', { willReadFrequently: true });
        
        // Init white bg
        latentState.ctx.fillStyle = latentState.backgroundColor;
        latentState.ctx.fillRect(0, 0, latentSketchCanvas.width, latentSketchCanvas.height);
        saveLatentHistory();

        // Event Listeners
        latentSketchCanvas.addEventListener('mousedown', startLatentDraw);
        latentSketchCanvas.addEventListener('mousemove', drawLatent);
        window.addEventListener('mouseup', endLatentDraw);
        
        latentSketchCanvas.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            const touch = e.touches[0];
            startLatentDraw({ clientX: touch.clientX, clientY: touch.clientY });
        }, { passive: false });
        latentSketchCanvas.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            const touch = e.touches[0];
            drawLatent({ clientX: touch.clientX, clientY: touch.clientY });
        }, { passive: false });
        latentSketchCanvas.addEventListener('touchend', endLatentDraw);

        // Tools
        const toolPencil = document.getElementById('toolPencil');
        const toolEraser = document.getElementById('toolEraser');
        const toolClear = document.getElementById('toolClear');
        const latentUndo = document.getElementById('latentUndo');
        const latentRandomizeSeed = document.getElementById('latentRandomizeSeed'); 
        const latentCloseBtn = document.getElementById('latentCloseBtn');
        const latentGenerateBtn = document.getElementById('latentGenerateBtn');
        const latentSendToWorkbench = document.getElementById('latentSendToWorkbench');

        if (toolPencil) toolPencil.onclick = (e) => setLatentTool('pencil', e.currentTarget);
        if (toolEraser) toolEraser.onclick = (e) => setLatentTool('eraser', e.currentTarget);
        if (toolClear) toolClear.onclick = clearLatentCanvas;
        if (latentUndo) latentUndo.onclick = undoLatentCanvas;
        if (latentRandomizeSeed) {
            latentRandomizeSeed.onclick = () => {
                // 1. 生成新的随机数
                latentState.seed = Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000000000);
                
                // 2. 给按钮一点视觉反馈（旋转一下）
                const icon = latentRandomizeSeed.querySelector('i');
                if(icon) {
                    icon.style.transition = 'transform 0.5s';
                    icon.style.transform = `rotate(${Math.random() * 360}deg)`;
                }

                // 3. 强制触发生成 (force=true)
                triggerLatentGeneration(true);
            };
        }
        
        if (openLatentCanvasBtn) openLatentCanvasBtn.onclick = () => {
            if (latentCanvasModal) latentCanvasModal.style.display = 'flex';
        };
        if (latentCloseBtn) latentCloseBtn.onclick = () => {
            if (latentCanvasModal) latentCanvasModal.style.display = 'none';
        };
        if (latentGenerateBtn) latentGenerateBtn.onclick = () => triggerLatentGeneration(true);
        
        if (latentSendToWorkbench) latentSendToWorkbench.onclick = async () => {
            if (latentResultImg && latentResultImg.src && !latentResultImg.src.includes('placeholder')) {
                const file = await dataURLToFile(latentResultImg.src, `latent-art-${Date.now()}.png`);
                addImageToWorkbench(file, '灵感绘图');
                if (latentCanvasModal) latentCanvasModal.style.display = 'none';
                addMessage({ sender: 'bot', content: '✅ 灵感绘图已发送到工作台。' });
            }
        };
    }

    function setLatentTool(tool, btn) {
        latentState.tool = tool;
        document.querySelectorAll('.brush-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
        if(btn) btn.classList.add('active');
    }

    function getLatentCoords(e) {
        const rect = latentSketchCanvas.getBoundingClientRect();
        return {
            x: (e.clientX - rect.left) * (latentSketchCanvas.width / rect.width),
            y: (e.clientY - rect.top) * (latentSketchCanvas.height / rect.height)
        };
    }

    function startLatentDraw(e) {
        latentState.isDrawing = true;
        const coords = getLatentCoords(e);
        latentState.lastX = coords.x;
        latentState.lastY = coords.y;
        saveLatentHistory();
    }

    function drawLatent(e) {
        if (!latentState.isDrawing) return;
        const coords = getLatentCoords(e);
        const ctx = latentState.ctx;
        
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(latentState.lastX, latentState.lastY);
        ctx.lineTo(coords.x, coords.y);
        ctx.lineCap = 'round';
        ctx.lineJoin = 'round';

        if (latentState.tool === 'pencil') {
            ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over';
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#000000';
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        } else {
            ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over';
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.lineWidth = 20;
        }

        ctx.stroke();
        latentState.lastX = coords.x;
        latentState.lastY = coords.y;
    }

    function endLatentDraw() {
        if (latentState.isDrawing) {
            latentState.isDrawing = false;
            const realtimeToggle = document.getElementById('realtimeToggle');
            if (realtimeToggle && realtimeToggle.checked) {
                clearTimeout(latentState.debounceTimer);
                latentState.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => triggerLatentGeneration(), 600);
            }
        }
    }

    function clearLatentCanvas() {
        saveLatentHistory();
        latentState.ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
        latentState.ctx.fillRect(0, 0, latentSketchCanvas.width, latentSketchCanvas.height);
        latentState.seed = Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000000000);
        const realtimeToggle = document.getElementById('realtimeToggle');
        if (realtimeToggle && realtimeToggle.checked) triggerLatentGeneration();
    }

    function saveLatentHistory() {
        if (latentState.history.length > 10) latentState.history.shift();
        latentState.history.push(latentSketchCanvas.toDataURL());
    }

    function undoLatentCanvas() {
        if (latentState.history.length > 0) {
            const prev = latentState.history.pop();
            const img = new Image();
            img.src = prev;
            img.onload = () => {
                latentState.ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0);
                const realtimeToggle = document.getElementById('realtimeToggle');
                if (realtimeToggle && realtimeToggle.checked) triggerLatentGeneration();
            };
        }
    }

    async function triggerLatentGeneration(force = false) {
        if (latentState.isGenerating && !force) return;
        
        const prompt = latentPromptInput ? latentPromptInput.value.trim() : '';
        if (!prompt && !force) return; // Wait for prompt if auto
        
        // Default prompt if empty
        const effectivePrompt = prompt || "A high quality realistic rendering of this sketch";

        latentState.isGenerating = true;
        if (latentLoader) latentLoader.style.display = 'flex';

        try {
            const base64Sketch = latentSketchCanvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', 0.8).split(',')[1];
            
            // Using gemini-2.5-flash-image for standard image-to-image capabilities as requested
            const response = await ai.models.generateContent({
                model: imageEditModel, // 'gemini-2.5-flash-image'
                contents: { parts: [
                    { text: `Turn this rough sketch into a high-quality, photorealistic image. Prompt: ${effectivePrompt}. Maintain the composition exactly.` },
                    { inlineData: { data: base64Sketch, mimeType: 'image/jpeg' } }
                ]},
                config: {
                    seed: latentState.seed // Seed Locking for consistency
                }
            });
            
            let imageData = null;
            // Iterate through parts to find the image
            if (response.candidates && response.candidates[0].content.parts) {
                for (const part of response.candidates[0].content.parts) {
                    if (part.inlineData) {
                        imageData = part.inlineData.data;
                        break;
                    }
                }
            }

            if (imageData && latentResultImg) {
                latentResultImg.src = `data:image/png;base64,${imageData}`;
            } else {
                 console.log("No image data in response, potentially text only:", response.text);
            }

        } catch (e) {
            console.error("Real-time gen error:", e);
        } finally {
            latentState.isGenerating = false;
            if (latentLoader) latentLoader.style.display = 'none';
        }
    }

    const isImageGenerationRequest = (text) => {
        const keywords = ['生成', '画', '绘制', '创造', '图片', '图像', '照片', '插画', '海报', 'logo', '图标', '风格', '场景', '人物', '建筑', '风景', '写实', '抽象', '4K', '高清', '渲染'];
        return keywords.some(keyword => text.toLowerCase().includes(keyword));
    };

    // --- Multi-Agent Debate Logic ---
    async function triggerAgentDebate(itemId) {
        const item = workbenchItems.get(itemId);
        if (!item) return;

        // UI Feedback
        addMessage({ sender: 'bot', type: 'text', content: '👥 正在召集专家团队（色彩、构图、甲方）对图片进行评审，请稍候...' });

        try {
            const base64Data = await fileToBase64(item.file);
            
            // Create promises for parallel execution
            const promises = Object.values(AGENTS).map(agent => 
                analyzeWithAgent(agent, base64Data, item.file.type)
            );

            const results = await Promise.all(promises);
            const validResults = results.filter(r => r !== null);

            if (item) {
                item.critiquesData = validResults;
                workbenchItems.set(itemId, item); // 确保更新到 Map 中
            }

            // Render in Chat
            renderAgentDebateInChat(validResults, itemId);

            // Render Sticky Notes on Workbench
            renderStickyNotesOnWorkbench(itemId, validResults);

        } catch (e) {
            console.error("Agent debate failed", e);
            addMessage({ sender: 'bot', type: 'text', content: '❌ 评审团连接失败，请重试。' });
        }
    }

    async function analyzeWithAgent(agent, base64Data, mimeType) {
    try {
        let prompt = `You are a professional ${agent.role}. Analyze the provided image from your specific viewpoint. Return a JSON object with "critique", "suggestion", "x", and "y" fields. "x" and "y" are percentage coordinates (0-100) of the most relevant area. "critique" must be in Chinese. "suggestion" must be a concise, actionable English prompt for an image model.`;
        
        switch(agent.id) {
            case 'describe':
                prompt = `As an ${agent.role}, your task is to provide a purely objective description of the image.
                - Analyze: Identify the main subject, setting, composition (e.g., rule of thirds, leading lines), color palette, and lighting conditions.
                - JSON Output:
                  - "critique": (Chinese) A factual summary of the image's key visual elements. Example: "画面主体为一只猫，位于中央，采用暖色调，右侧有窗户光源。"
                  - "suggestion": (English) A descriptive prompt that could generate this image. Example: "photo of a cat sitting on a wooden floor, warm sunlight from a window on the right".
                  - "x": 50
                  - "y": 50`;
                break;
            case 'critique':
                prompt = `As an ${agent.role}, your task is to provide a professional artistic critique.
                - Analyze: Evaluate the image's strengths and weaknesses in terms of emotional impact, storytelling, technical execution (focus, exposure), and aesthetics. Be specific.
                - JSON Output:
                  - "critique": (Chinese) A concise critique identifying one key area for improvement. Example: "画面整体偏暗，主体与背景融合度过高，缺乏层次感。"
                  - "suggestion": (English) A prompt to address the critique. Example: "add dramatic backlighting to separate the subject from the background, increase contrast".
                  - "x": The x-coordinate of the main issue.
                  - "y": The y-coordinate of the main issue.`;
                break;
            case 'suggest':
                 prompt = `As a ${agent.role}, your task is to propose a concrete, creative change.
                - Analyze: Brainstorm a specific, actionable modification that would creatively alter or enhance the image. This could be a style change, adding an element, or changing the mood.
                - JSON Output:
                  - "critique": (Chinese) A brief statement of your creative idea. Example: "如果将场景变为雨夜，也许会更有故事氛围。"
                  - "suggestion": (English) A precise prompt to execute this idea. Example: "change the scene to a rainy night, add reflections on wet ground, neon lights in the background".
                  - "x": The x-coordinate of where the change would be most impactful.
                  - "y": The y-coordinate of where the change would be most impactful.`;
                break;
        }

        const fullPrompt = `${prompt}\n\nReturn ONLY raw JSON, no markdown formatting or explanations.`;

        const response = await ai.models.generateContent({
            model: textModel,
            contents: {
                parts: [
                    { text: fullPrompt },
                    { inlineData: { data: base64Data, mimeType: mimeType || 'image/png' } }
                ]
            }
        });

        const text = response.text.trim().replace(/```json|```/g, '');
        const data = JSON.parse(text);
        
        return {
            agent: agent,
            ...data
        };

    } catch (e) {
        console.error(`Agent ${agent.name} failed`, e);
        return null;
    }
}

    function renderAgentDebateInChat(critiques, itemId) {
        const containerId = `debate-${Date.now()}`;
        let html = `
            <div class="agent-debate-container" id="${containerId}">
                <div class="agent-debate-header">
                    <i class="fas fa-users"></i> 专家评审团建议
                </div>
                <div class="agent-debate-list">
        `;

        critiques.forEach(c => {
            const escapedSuggestion = c.suggestion.replace(/'/g, "\\'").replace(/"/g, '"').replace(/\n/g, ' ');
            html += `
                <div class="agent-msg-item" onclick="window.applyAgentSuggestion('${escapedSuggestion}')">
                    <div class="agent-avatar" style="background: ${c.agent.color}">
                        <i class="fas ${c.agent.icon}"></i>
                    </div>
                    <div class="agent-content">
                        <div class="agent-name" style="color: ${c.agent.color}">
                            ${c.agent.name}
                        </div>
                        <div class="agent-text">"${c.critique}"</div>
                        <div class="agent-action">
                            <i class="fas fa-magic"></i> 点击采纳修改
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `;
        });

        html += `</div></div>`;
        
        // Create message div manually to support HTML content
        const div = document.createElement('div');
        div.className = 'message bot-message';
        const botAvatar = `<img src="https://www.marmoai.cn/images/avatars/WeChat84b8e05cc8464bb089de1c46bed38809.jpg" alt="小M" style="width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%; flex-shrink: 0;">`;
        div.innerHTML = botAvatar + html;
        chatMessages.appendChild(div);
        chatMessages.scrollTop = chatMessages.scrollHeight;
    }

    // Expose to window for inline onclick
    window.applyAgentSuggestion = async (prompt, itemId) => {
        if (!userInput) return;

        // 1. 填充文字
        userInput.value = prompt;

        // 2. 如果提供了图片ID，自动将图片设为当前编辑对象
        if (itemId) {
            const item = workbenchItems.get(itemId);
            if (item && item.file) {
                try {
                    // 模拟选中图片的逻辑 (参考了 select-image-btn 的点击逻辑)
                    // 如果需要深拷贝文件防止引用问题，可以使用 dataURLToFile 重新生成，
                    // 但这里直接复用 item.file 通常也是安全的且更快。
                    mainImageFile = item.file;
                    lastGeneratedImageForEditing = item.file;
                    
                    // 重置其他状态
                    isContextPreviewHidden = false;
                    maskDataUrl = null;
                    referenceImageFiles = []; // 清空参考图，专注于单图修改
                    pendingBaseImageShare = true;
                    pendingReferenceImageShares.clear();
                    
                    // 刷新输入框上方的预览区
                    await updateImagePreview();
                    
                    // 在聊天记录里加一条这种“系统级”的操作提示可选，但为了流畅可以省略
                    // 或者添加一条 user message 表示选中了图片
                } catch (e) {
                    console.error("Auto-select image failed:", e);
                }
            }
        }

        // 3. 更新按钮状态并自动发送
        updateSendBtnState();
        
        // 只有当发送按钮可用时（意味着有图或有字），才触发发送
        if (sendBtn && !sendBtn.disabled) {
            // 给一个小延迟，让UI先渲染预览图，体验更好
            setTimeout(() => {
                sendBtn.click();
            }, 100);
        }
    };
function renderStickyNotesOnWorkbench(itemId, critiques) {
        const item = workbenchItems.get(itemId);
        if (!item || !item.el) return;

        // 移除旧的便签
        item.el.querySelectorAll('.sticky-note').forEach(n => n.remove());

        // 使用索引来垂直堆叠便签
        let noteIndex = 0;

        critiques.forEach(c => {
            const note = document.createElement('div');
            note.className = 'sticky-note';
            
            // --- 尺寸与初始定位 (与之前相同) ---
            note.style.width = '150px';
            note.style.padding = '8px';
            note.style.fontSize = '11px';
            note.style.borderTopWidth = '12px';
            note.style.left = '102%'; 
            
            const desiredVisualOffsetY = 40; 
            const verticalOffset = noteIndex * (desiredVisualOffsetY / workbenchZoom); 
            note.style.top = `${verticalOffset}px`;

            const inverseScale = 1 / workbenchZoom;
            note.style.transformOrigin = `top left`;
            note.style.transform = `scale(${inverseScale}) rotate(1deg)`;

            // --- 核心修复：更新事件监听器 ---
            // 确保事件触发时，总是使用全局最新的 `workbenchZoom` 值
            note.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                const currentInverseScale = 1 / workbenchZoom; // 读取实时缩放值
                note.style.transform = `scale(${1.05 * currentInverseScale}) rotate(0deg)`;
                note.style.zIndex = '150';
            });
            note.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                const currentInverseScale = 1 / workbenchZoom; // 读取实时缩放值
                note.style.transform = `scale(${currentInverseScale}) rotate(1deg)`; // 保持旋转角度一致
                note.style.zIndex = '100';
            });
            // --- 修复结束 ---

            note.style.borderTopColor = c.agent.color + '40';

            note.innerHTML = `
                <div class="sticky-header" style="color:${c.agent.color}">
                    <div class="sticky-icon" style="background:${c.agent.color}">
                        <i class="fas ${c.agent.icon}"></i>
                    </div>
                    ${c.agent.name}
                </div>
                <div>${c.critique}</div>
                <button class="sticky-action-btn">采纳建议</button>
            `;

            const btn = note.querySelector('button');
            if (btn) {
                btn.onclick = (e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    window.applyAgentSuggestion(c.suggestion, itemId); 
                    note.remove(); 
                };
            }
            
            note.onclick = (e) => e.stopPropagation();

            item.el.appendChild(note);
            noteIndex++;
        });
    }
    
    const createImageWithHole = (baseImageFile, maskDataUrl) => {
        return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
            const baseImg = new Image();
            const maskImg = new Image();
            let loadedCount = 0;

            const onImageLoad = () => {
                loadedCount++;
                if (loadedCount < 2) return;

                const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
                const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
                canvas.width = baseImg.naturalWidth;
                canvas.height = baseImg.naturalHeight;
                ctx.drawImage(baseImg, 0, 0);
                ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'destination-out';
                ctx.drawImage(maskImg, 0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
                ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over';
                canvas.toBlob(blob => {
                    if (blob) {
                        const newFile = new File([blob], `edited-${baseImageFile.name}`, { type: 'image/png' });
                        resolve(newFile);
                    } else {
                        reject(new Error('Canvas toBlob failed.'));
                    }
                }, 'image/png');
            };
            
            baseImg.onload = onImageLoad;
            maskImg.onload = onImageLoad;
            baseImg.onerror = (err) => reject(err);
            maskImg.onerror = (err) => reject(err);

            baseImg.src = URL.createObjectURL(baseImageFile);
            maskImg.src = maskDataUrl;
        });
    };

    const getImageDimensions = (file) => {
        return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
            const img = new Image();
            const objectURL = URL.createObjectURL(file);
            img.onload = () => {
                resolve({ width: img.naturalWidth, height: img.naturalHeight });
                URL.revokeObjectURL(objectURL);
            };
            img.onerror = (err) => {
                reject(err);
                URL.revokeObjectURL(objectURL);
            };
            img.src = objectURL;
        });
    };

    const getClosestSupportedAspectRatio = (width, height) => {
        const originalRatio = width / height;
        const supportedRatios = {
            '16:9': 16 / 9,
            '9:16': 9 / 16,
            '4:3': 4 / 3,
            '3:4': 3 / 4,
            '1:1': 1,
        };

        let closestRatioName = '1:1';
        let minDifference = Infinity;

        for (const [name, ratioValue] of Object.entries(supportedRatios)) {
            const difference = Math.abs(originalRatio - ratioValue);
            if (difference < minDifference) {
                minDifference = difference;
                closestRatioName = name;
            }
        }
        return closestRatioName;
    };

    const isRemovalRequest = (text) => {
        const keywords = ['remove', 'delete', 'erase', 'get rid of', '去除', '删除', '擦掉', '去掉', '移除'];
        return keywords.some(keyword => text.toLowerCase().includes(keyword));
    };

    const isMaterialRequest = (text) => {
            const keywords = ['材质', '纹理', '表面', '质感', '图案', '换皮', 'material', 'texture', 'surface', 'pattern'];
            return keywords.some(keyword => text.toLowerCase().includes(keyword));
        };
async function editOrQueryImageWithGemini(prompt, baseImage, referenceImages = [], mask = null, forcedAspectRatio = null) {
    if (!baseImage) throw new Error("A base image is required for editing or querying.");
    
    const dimensions = await getImageDimensions(baseImage);
    // Use forced ratio if provided (critical for outpainting), otherwise calculate from image
    const closestAspectRatio = forcedAspectRatio || getClosestSupportedAspectRatio(dimensions.width, dimensions.height);

    const allParts = [];
    const isMaskedEditTask = !!mask;
    const isRemovalTask = isRemovalRequest(prompt);
    const isMaterialTask = isMaterialRequest(prompt); 

    const textOutputInstructionSuffix = `\n\nAfter generating the image, you MUST also provide a brief, professional summary in Chinese. This summary must describe your action in the context of the user's original request. For example, if the user's instruction was to 'replace' an object, use the word '替换'. If the instruction was to 'add' something, use '添加'. IMPORTANT: The summary must use the first-person "我" and must NOT mention technical terms like "transparent areas" or "black areas". Your response must conclude with "如需调整请继续告诉我".`;
   
    let finalPrompt;

    if (isMaskedEditTask) {
        // --- NEW DUAL-TRACK LOGIC FOR MASKED EDITS ---
        if (isMaterialTask) {
            // NON-DESTRUCTIVE workflow for high-fidelity material replacement
            // 1. Send the original, complete image
            const imageBase64 = await fileToBase64(baseImage);
            allParts.push({ inlineData: { data: imageBase64, mimeType: baseImage.type || 'image/png' } });

            // 2. Send the white mask as a separate instruction image
            const maskBase64 = mask.split(',')[1];
            allParts.push({ inlineData: { data: maskBase64, mimeType: 'image/png' } });
            
            // 3. Craft a new prompt that understands this 2-image input
            finalPrompt = `You are a professional 3D rendering texture artist performing a high-fidelity material replacement.
            You have received two images: a main image and a mask image. The WHITE area in the mask image defines the ONLY target zone for your edits.
            The user's specific request is: "${prompt}".
            Your sole task is to change ONLY the surface material, texture, or pattern of the object within the mask's white area on the main image.
            **CRITICAL RULE:** You must absolutely preserve the original object's underlying 3D shape, structure, contour, and form. The shape must remain 100% unchanged.
            Imagine you are applying a new texture map to a pre-existing, fixed 3D model defined by the main image. The mask tells you where to apply it. You can only change the 'skin', not the 'skeleton'.
            Do NOT edit any area outside the white mask region. The final result must be a seamless integration.`;

        } else {
            // DESTRUCTIVE (hole-punch) workflow for all other masked tasks (removal, generic fill, etc.)
            const imageToSend = await createImageWithHole(baseImage, mask);
            const imageBase64 = await fileToBase64(imageToSend);
            allParts.push({ inlineData: { data: imageBase64, mimeType: imageToSend.type || 'image/png' } });

            if (isRemovalTask) {
                finalPrompt = `You are a professional inpainting artist. Your sole task is to intelligently and realistically fill the transparent area in this image. Reconstruct the background seamlessly, perfectly matching the original lighting, shadows, and textures of the surrounding area. The result should be a photorealistic image where the original object is gone and the background is flawlessly restored.`;
            } else if (referenceImages.length > 0) {
                finalPrompt = `Visual Object Replacement: Use the provided reference image(s) to completely fill the transparent area in the main scene. Instruction: "${prompt}". Match the lighting, shadows, and perspective of the environment for a seamless integration.`;
            } else {
                finalPrompt = `Intelligently fill the transparent area based on: "${prompt}". Make the new content look completely natural and perfectly blended with the rest of the image.`;
            }
        }
    } else { // No mask workflow (unchanged)
        const imageBase64 = await fileToBase64(baseImage);
        allParts.push({ inlineData: { data: imageBase64, mimeType: baseImage.type || 'image/png' } });
        if (referenceImages.length > 0) {
            finalPrompt = `${prompt}. Use the following image(s) as a style and content reference.`
        } else {
            finalPrompt = prompt;
        }
    }

    const combinedPrompt = finalPrompt + textOutputInstructionSuffix;
        allParts.push({ text: combinedPrompt });

    // Add reference images, but not for removal tasks.
    if (!isRemovalTask) {
        for (const file of referenceImages) {
            const base64Data = await fileToBase64(file);
            allParts.push({ inlineData: { data: base64Data, mimeType: file.type || 'image/png' } });
        }
    }
    
    const config = {
        imageConfig: {
            aspectRatio: closestAspectRatio
        }
    };
    
    const response = await ai.models.generateContent({
        model: imageEditModel,
        contents: { parts: allParts },
        config: config,
    });
    
    const result = { success: true, text: '', imageData: null, mimeType: null };
    for (const part of response.candidates[0].content.parts) {
        if (part.text) result.text += part.text;
        else if (part.inlineData) {
            result.imageData = part.inlineData.data;
            result.mimeType = part.inlineData.mimeType || 'image/png';
        }
    }
    if (!result.text && !result.imageData) throw new Error("Content was blocked or the response was empty.");
    return result;
}



async function editOrQueryImageWithGemini_Multiple(prompt, baseImage, referenceImages = [], mask = null, forcedAspectRatio = null) {
    const promises = Array(4).fill(null).map(() => 
        editOrQueryImageWithGemini(prompt, baseImage, referenceImages, mask, forcedAspectRatio)
    );

    const results = await Promise.allSettled(promises);

    const successfulResults = results
        .filter(result => result.status === 'fulfilled' && result.value.success && result.value.imageData)
        .map(result => result.value);
    
    if (successfulResults.length === 0) {
        const firstError = results.find(r => r.status === 'rejected');
        throw new Error(firstError?.reason?.message || "All image editing attempts failed.");
    }
    
    const firstText = successfulResults[0]?.text || '';
    const allImageData = successfulResults.map(res => ({ imageData: res.imageData, mimeType: res.mimeType }));

    return { success: true, text: firstText, imageData: allImageData };
}
